title: Stage - Assistant(e) Technicien(ne) Produit Chaine et Trame (H/F)
description_text:
J’ai l’immense plaisir d’écrire à vos côtés l’histoire de la première marque de mode française née en ligne. Une histoire nommée Sézane, qui place le bon sens, la qualité et la créativité au cœur de tout. 
Raconter Sézane, c’est plus de 20 ans d’une succession d’aventures fondatrices et de choix : le choix de faire autrement, le choix de l’humain, le choix d’agir, mais aussi le choix de faire confiance à ses convictions et à la possibilité de déconstruire certaines idées.
C’est explorer le fond et la forme, bien plus qu’une histoire de mode - mais une histoire de vie(s) - la mienne, la vôtre et celles de tous ceux qui contribuent à l’écrire. 
Nous recherchons aujourd’hui des talents créatifs, structurés et agiles qui partagent l’envie d’améliorer sans cesse tout ce qui peut l’être. Des talents passionnés, autonomes qui conçoivent le travail dans le respect des autres et pour qui rien n'est hors d'atteinte, pour peu qu'on s'en donne les moyens.
Envie d’imaginer la suite de cette histoire à nos côtés ? Ecrivez-nous !
Nous recherchons les talents d’un(e) Assistant(e) Technicien(ne) Produit Chaine et Trame (H/F) pour rejoindre notre équipe Production PAP à l’occasion d’un stage de 6 mois à partir de Mai ou Juin 2026.
Ce poste est basé à Paris (75).
Vos principales missions seront :
Aide aux prises de mesures sur prototypes, têtes de série et échantillons
Participation à l’analyse des sections et à la vérification des proportions
Mise à jour et contrôle des tableaux de mesures
Assistance lors des essayages (prise de notes, photos, commentaires techniques)
Aide à la rédaction et à la mise à jour des dossiers techniques
Vérification de la conformité des modèles par rapport aux fiches techniques
Soutien ponctuel aux modélistes sur les tâches quotidiennes du bureau d’études
Vous êtes actuellement en formation supérieure en école de mode ou modélisme/ production, ou équivalent universitaire et vous avez de bonnes connaissances sur le vêtement et une belle sensibilité produit ;
Rigoureux(se) et autonome vous faites preuve de souplesse et avez un bon sens des responsabilités et des priorités ;
Vous aimez et savez travailler en équipe ;
Vous maîtrisez le pack office, et Illustrator ;
Vous souhaitez évoluer dans un environnement international et parlez pour cela un anglais courant. 
Sézane recrute et valorise tous les talents, quels que soient votre genre, âge, nationalité, culture, croyances religieuses et orientations sexuelles.
Vous vous êtes reconnu(e) dans ce descriptif et souhaitez rejoindre l’aventure Sézane ? Alors n’attendez plus ! ;)
ai_core_responsibilities: The main responsibilities include assisting with measurements on prototypes and samples, participating in analysis and verification of proportions, and supporting model verification against technical sheets. Additional tasks involve updating technical documents and providing support to modelers in daily tasks.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should be in higher education in fashion or modeling/production and possess good knowledge of clothing with a strong product sensitivity. They should be rigorous, autonomous, flexible, and able to work well in a team, with proficiency in Office and Illustrator, and fluent in English.
linkedin_org_slogan: Première marque née en ligne, créée par Morgane Sézalory. Qualité, engagement et créativité sont au coeur de tout.
linkedin_org_description:
Fondée en 2013 par Morgane Sézalory, Sézane est la première marque de mode française à placer la qualité, la créativité et le prix juste au coeur de ses collections. Certifiée B Corp, ce label exigent atteste de son engagement à respecter des normes environnementales et sociales strictes. 

Pour nous rejoindre, on vous donne rendez-vous sur notre site carrière (https://apply.workable.com/sezane-3/) où vous trouverez nos différentes offres.
Si aucune ne correspond précisément à votre profil, n'hésitez pas à nous écrire à candidature@sezane.com.

title: Ingénieur solaire photovoltaïque
locations_alt_raw: Abidjan, Abidjan Autonomous District, Côte d'Ivoire
description_text:
Daystar Power consolide ses activités en Afrique de l’Ouest et Côte d'Ivoire et est à la recherche d’un ingénieur dans le domaine du génie électrique avec une bonne connaissance en énergie solaire photovoltaïque. Le futur collaborateur aura pour mission de planifier, coordonner, réaliser, maintenir et surveiller les installations électriques solaires en Côte d'Ivoire.
1. Management des installations:
Élaborer et tenir à jour des calendriers d'exécution des projets solaires.
Concevoir et planifier l’installation de centrales d'énergie solaire PV.
Superviser le processus d'achat à l’étranger et localement.
Assurer la qualité des installations techniques.
Diriger, coordonner et superviser les installations de solutions d'énergie solaire sur le terrain.
Former le client sur l'exploitation et l'utilisation optimale du système.
2. Réaliser des audits énergétiques
3. Exploitation & Maintenance:
Résoudre les problèmes des systèmes à distance et par le biais de visites sur site.
Assurer la satisfaction du client.
Superviser les maintenances de routine ou dépannage.
4. Général:
Développer et mettre en application des procédures opérationnelles standards et des normes HSE pour les travaux d'installation solaire.
Développer et coacher le personnel technique pour atteindre les objectifs de l'entreprise.
Qualifications:
Education : Au minimum une licence en Ingénierie électrique, un master est un avantage.
Expérience : Au minimum 3 ans d’expérience dans des rôles en génie électrique (conception, construction, opération et maintenance), de préférence dans l'industrie des énergies renouvelables et plus particulièrement dans le solaire photovoltaïque.
Maitriser les logiciels Autocad, PVSyst, Helioscope, MS Project est un avantage.
Avoir participé/exécuté des projets solaires de moyennes et grandes tailles est un atout.
Compétence Linguistique : Français (courant) et l’anglais à un niveau professionnel est nécessaire.
La détention du permis de conduire est un avantage.
Doit démontrer une maîtrise de Microsoft Office (Microsoft Excel en particulier).
Profil recherché :
Motivé(e), engagé(e) et capable de prospérer sous pression.
Très sensible au travail de qualité, esprit analytique, passion d’apprendre.
Bonnes compétences en communication et capacité à diriger et à bien travailler en équipe.
Très organisé(e) et capable de gérer plusieurs projets en parallèle et de prioriser les demandes concurrentes.
Passion pour les énergies renouvelables ou l'électricité.
Show less
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves managing solar installations by developing execution schedules, designing PV power plants, supervising procurement, ensuring technical quality, and leading on-site solar solution installations in Ivory Coast. Responsibilities also include resolving system issues remotely and via site visits, supervising maintenance, and training clients on optimal system use.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a minimum of a Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, with a Master's being advantageous, alongside at least 3 years of experience in electrical engineering roles, preferably within the renewable energy or photovoltaic solar sector. Fluency in French and professional proficiency in English are mandatory.
linkedin_org_slogan: Daystar Power provides businesses in Africa with clean, continuous and affordable power.
linkedin_org_locations: Silicon Avenue, Ebene Cybercity, Mauritius 72201, MU
linkedin_org_description:
Sub-Saharan Africa is in the middle of a power crisis, with large portions of the population not having access to electricity. Businesses and consumers who do have access to the grid, often have to deal with daily power outages which can last up to several days. 

Most businesses across Sub-Saharan Africa rely on expensive and polluting diesel generators to bridge the supply-demand gap of electricity. Daystar Power focuses on hybrid solar power solutions for commercial customers for either a cash sale or a monthly fee. Daystar Power delivers three significant benefits to its customers: 1) reducing the cost of energy, 2) providing a stable power supply and  3) reducing pollution.

title: Platform Engineer
description_text:
Who are we 
We are a vibrant tech company that augments and empowers technical teams for both international and Greek clients. What sets us apart is our unique blend of coaching, continuous learning, and innovation, forming an ecosystem where professionals don’t just contribute, they grow. 
By joining Agile Actors, you don’t just work on cutting-edge solutions: You become part of diverse, dynamic teams where every step is a new career milestone. Our tech professionals augment teams that are global leaders in their domains, such as Austrian Post, Red Hat, Swissquote, and others. 
We are firm believers that work should be more than just a job: It should be a place where people thrive. That’s why we’re proud to be officially certified as a Best Place to Work 2025, a recognition that reflects our commitment to creating an environment where talent, passion, and growth flourish. 
Our values
Having a purpose
Being adventurous
Being Agile
Respect and Empower
Authenticity and Trust
Evolving through our clients
Who will succeed in this role
We’re looking for tech professionals with purpose, curiosity, and passion, people who see challenges as opportunities and want their work to have real impact. If solving problems excites you and collaborating with others inspires you, you’ll feel right at home with us. 
At Agile Actors, being part of our team means being adventurous and agile, ready to embrace new ideas and adapt to dynamic environments. You’ll join one of our local teams in Athens, working with talented clients to deliver solutions that shape the future of technology. As you grow through projects with global leaders, you’ll be constantly evolving, while being supported in an environment built on trust, respect, and empowerment. 
Platform Operations & Support
Monitor, maintain, and optimize store-level platforms to ensure high availability, stability, and performance. 
Provide Tier 2 technical support to store operations teams, troubleshooting issues related to data flows, system performance, and system integrations. 
Collaborate with internal teams and external vendors to resolve platform incidents efficiently and minimize operational disruption. 
Systems Integration & Data Management
Strong understanding of relational databases, including writing and optimizing SQL queries, performing data validation, and supporting ETL processes. 
Solid knowledge of system integration patterns, including: 
API-based integrations 
Event-driven architectures 
Flat-file integrations 
Message queues 
Real-time and batch processing 
Ability to work closely with engineering teams to implement, test, validate, and support integrations between store systems and enterprise platforms. 
Lifecycle & System Performance
Ensure overall system stability and provide technical guidance during new system implementations. 
Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives for deployment pipelines, operational workflows, and system reliability. 
Support release processes and post-deployment validation activities. 
Monitoring & Reliability
Implement, enhance, and maintain monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions to proactively detect and resolve performance issues. 
Participate in on-call rotation for critical store systems, ensuring timely incident response. 
Perform root-cause analysis and contribute to long-term system stability and reliability improvements. 
Collaboration & Communication
Act as a key liaison between delivery, product, engineering, and business teams, ensuring clear communication of technical topics and operational risks. 
Produce and maintain technical documentation, including system flows, operational procedures, troubleshooting guides, and knowledge base articles. 
Provide training, knowledge sharing, and technical guidance to cross-functional teams when required. 
What's in for you
Tailored Remuneration Package that recognizes your expertise with a competitive salary 
Private Health Care Insurance to ensure your physical well-being
Ticket Restaurant Card 
Psychological Support through a professional helpline for you and your family, with 5 free sessions included to promote mental well-being. 
Developmental Benefits
Internal Coaching Program empowers your growth, with experienced coaches supporting both technical and soft skills development. 
Personal Development Plan tailored with your coach to align with your career aspirations. 
360° Continuous Feedback Model to keep your skills and performance aligned with your goals. 
Unlimited Training & Learning resources to cover all aspects of your professional growth, including access to various online platforms such as Udemy, Coursera, and Pluralsight from day one. 
Career Development Pathways that offer mentoring, leadership programs, and opportunities to enhance both technical and leadership skills. 
Chapters (Internal Communities) for sharing knowledge, mentoring, and shaping technology’s future. 
Diverse Customer Ecosystem offers dynamic opportunities for career growth and development. 
Onboarding Buddy to support and guide you from day one.
Working model
Flexible Working conditions tailored to your assigned account. 
Work-Life Balance with a culture that promotes flexibility and sustainability. 
By clicking "Apply" for this Job, you agree that you have read and accepted our terms relating to job applicants and that you provide your consent for the processing of your personal data for the purposes described therein.
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves monitoring, maintaining, and optimizing store-level platforms to ensure high availability and performance, while providing Tier 2 technical support for issues related to data flows and system performance. Responsibilities also include managing system integrations, supporting ETL processes, and contributing to continuous improvement initiatives for operational workflows and system reliability.
ai_requirements_summary: The ideal candidate should possess a strong understanding of relational databases, including SQL optimization, and solid knowledge of system integration patterns such as APIs and event-driven architectures. Success requires being adventurous, agile, passionate about problem-solving, and capable of collaborating effectively across engineering, product, and business teams.
linkedin_org_locations: 62A Ethnikis Antistaseos, Chalandri, Attica GR-15231, GR
linkedin_org_description:
We deliver software development & data engineering services to our clients by building, coaching & managing cross-functional teams of tech professionals which augment, extend and enhance our client's development skills, competencies and capacity.

We differentiate through our unique approach of continuous development & improvement of our  tech professionals’ skills & competencies.

We are an ecosystem for the ambitious & talented tech professionals to pursue their career goals. 
An environment that a tech professional can find guidance, coaching and  personal development, according to their personal objectives,  through real projects for real customers.

Our areas of expertise include: 
- UX and UI Design
- Business Analysis
- Product and Service Design
- Software Development
- DevOps
- Quality Assurance 
- Test Automation
- Data Engineering
- Agile Coaching
- Team Leadership

title: Conseiller(ère) de vente H/F (CDD 28h) - Guess Roppenheim denim
description_text:
Vous êtes passionné(e) par la mode et l'expérience client ? GUESS France recherche un(e) conseiller(ère) de vente dynamique et ambitieux(euse) dans le cadre d'un CDD 28h à pourvoir à compter du 3 mars 2026 dans le cadre d'un remplacement. Vous serez l’ambassadeur(drice) de la marque Guess, en partageant votre passion pour la mode et en aidant les clients à trouver le style qui leur correspond.
Vos missions
Accueillir et conseiller les clients avec enthousiasme, 
Offrir une expérience shopping personnalisée pour fidéliser notre clientèle,
Relever les challenges de vente pour contribuer activement à atteindre les objectifs et maintenir un environnement de travail positif,
Veiller à la bonne tenue du point de vente et contribuer à la mise en valeur des produits,
Participer à la gestion des stocks, 
Agir en conformité avec les règles, valeurs et procédures GUESS.
Expérience dans la vente de minimim 2 ans, de préférence dans le secteur de la mode,
Motivé(e), souriant(e) et force de proposition,
Sens de l'écoute et capacité à comprendre les besoins des clients,
Esprit d'équipe, adaptabilité et motivation à travailler dans un environnement dynamique,
Excellentes communication et présentation soignée
Passion pour la mode et excellentes connaissances des tendances.
Salaire : 1458,42 € sur 13 mois
Indemnités de transport
Titres restaurant
Mutuelle et prévoyance
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves acting as a brand ambassador by enthusiastically welcoming and advising customers to provide a personalized shopping experience, while actively contributing to sales goals. Responsibilities also include maintaining the sales floor appearance, assisting with stock management, and adhering to all company procedures.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a minimum of two years of sales experience, preferably in the fashion sector, and demonstrate a strong passion for fashion and current trends. Essential qualities include being motivated, having excellent listening skills to understand client needs, strong communication, and a proactive team spirit.
linkedin_org_description:
Established in 1981, GUESS began as a jeans company and has since successfully grown into a global lifestyle brand.  Guess?, Inc. designs, markets, distributes, and licenses a lifestyle collection of contemporary apparel, denim, handbags, watches, eyewear, footwear, and other related consumer products. Guess? products are distributed through branded Guess? stores as well as better department and specialty stores around the world. 
As of January 30, 2021, the Company directly operated 1,046 retail stores in the Americas, Europe, and Asia. 
The Company’s partners and distributors operated 524 additional retail stores worldwide. 
As of January 30, 2021, the Company and its partners and distributors operated in approximately 100 countries worldwide. 

For more information about the Company, please visit www.guess.com.

title: Junior Consultant Ophthalmologist-Private Sector
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is seeking a dedicated and enthusiastic Junior Consultant Ophthalmologist for a position in the private sector. This role is ideal for those who are passionate about delivering exceptional eye care and are eager to continue their professional development in a supportive environment.
As a Junior Consultant Ophthalmologist, you will collaborate with a team of experienced specialists to provide comprehensive assessments and treatments for a variety of ocular conditions. This position will provide the opportunity to gain invaluable experience in both clinical and surgical settings.
Key Responsibilities:
Perform thorough eye examinations to diagnose eye diseases and conditions.
Assist in medical and surgical management of patients.
Participate in surgical procedures under the supervision of senior ophthalmologists.
Educate patients regarding their eye health and available treatment options.
Conduct follow-up consultations to monitor patient outcomes and adjust treatment plans as needed.
Collaborate with the multidisciplinary healthcare team to enhance patient care.
Engage in ongoing professional development and training opportunities.
Medical Degree (MD or equivalent) with completed residency in Ophthalmology.
Board eligibility in Ophthalmology; certification preferred.
Prior experience in ophthalmology is desirable but not essential.
Strong understanding of ocular anatomy, conditions, and treatment methodologies.
Excellent communication skills and a patient-centered approach.
Willingness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced clinical environment.
Strong attention to detail and commitment to providing high standards of care.
Demonstrated ethical standards and commitment to patient confidentiality.
Must hold a valid medical license for practice in the respective state or region.
Ability to work within a team-oriented environment.
Private Health Insurance
Training & Development
Performance Bonus
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Junior Consultant Ophthalmologist, you will perform thorough eye examinations and assist in the medical and surgical management of patients. You will also educate patients about their eye health and collaborate with a multidisciplinary healthcare team.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must hold a Medical Degree (MD or equivalent) and have completed a residency in Ophthalmology. Board eligibility in Ophthalmology is required, and prior experience is desirable but not essential.
linkedin_org_locations: Office 113, Al Khaimah Building, Port Saeed Deira, Dubai UAE Tel:  00971 4 2555465, Deira, Dubai 25570, AE

title: Lead Game Security Engineer
description_text:
We want you to #JOINTHEREBELLION! 
For 30 years we’ve been independently developing and publishing incredible video games at our multiple studios founded by Jason & Chris Kingsley, but Rebellion is more than just games. We have our own film studio, we create board games, publish books, and through 2000AD, publish comics and graphic novels such as the amazing Judge Dredd.
We’re hiring a Lead Game Security Engineer to join at the start of a large new project, with the opportunity to shape the security architecture used across all Asura titles and build a new Game Security team from the ground up.
Based within our in-house Tech Team, you will benefit from working closely with other engineering and project teams to research, reverse engineer, design and implement solutions that deliver robust defences against cheating, piracy, and other attacks, protecting both the player experience and the business as threats and tactics evolve.
Responsibilities:
Build and manage a team of developers and analysts to develop and maintain software to defend against cheating, piracy and other threats.
Develop and own process framework which encompasses the whole lifecycle of managing security threats from monitoring, investigation and identification through to successful mitigation.
Develop in-house capability for the utilisation of reverse engineering and other techniques to analyse and report on malicious code.
Work with broader code teams to establish a development environment in which security best practices are embedded.
Supporting the QA department in building the capability to validate and safely release defensive software.
We believe in the power of face-to-face collaboration and encourage working from one of our studios and can provide a relocation package, including moving assistance, temporary accommodation, and full support to ensure a smooth transition to your new environment.
However, we understand that flexibility matters, so we’re open to discussing hybrid options based on individual needs. 
Extensive track record of safely and successfully delivering anti-cheat and DRM functionality for C++ software in a senior or leadership role
Strong expertise in implementing anti-cheat techniques and digital rights management technologies and the ability to further develop that expertise in team members.
Demonstrable background and experience in reverse engineering and analysing game cheats, digital rights management circumvention and other similar abuse vectors
Deep understanding of relevant technical tools and standards (for instance PE and ELF file formats and software such as IDA Pro or Ghidra)
Nice to have:
Experience shipping or operating online/multiplayer/live-service games at scale. 
Knowledge of cryptography and network protocols, plus tools such as OpenSSL and Wireshark. 
Published security research, responsible disclosure, or public white-hat work. 
Familiarity with the Windows Resiliency Initiative.
We offer an extensive benefits package to our team including: 
22 days holidays + Christmas closure (typically 4 days) & Bank holidays (increasing with service at 5 years – one day each year until you reach 31 days)
Private Medical Insurance, healthcare cash plan, including dental and Vision
Life Assurance, Income Protection & Critical Illness Cover
Enhanced Family Leave 
Interest Free, Tax-Free loans
Enhanced Pension Scheme
EAP a range of Mental Health and Wellbeing Support 
Plus loads more… including a wide range of discounts, freebies, and social events! 
Right to Work Statement
This role is only open to applicants who have the permanent right to work in the UK. We are unable to provide or take over visa sponsorship, either now or in the future. Applicants must therefore be able to demonstrate their ongoing eligibility to work in the UK without the need for employer sponsorship.
Life at Our Oxford HQ
Our riverside headquarters in Oxford places you a short walk away from the city centre. Renowned for its rich historical backdrop and esteemed educational institutions, Oxford offers a unique blend of tradition and modernity, with its beautiful architecture and green spaces.
Oxford also boasts excellent transport links, making it easy to navigate both the city and the wider country. The city’s train station, just a short walk from our studio, offers frequent services to London, as well as direct routes to major cities like Birmingham, Manchester, and Reading and we also offer free parking at the studio.
Our open-plan office promotes teamwork and innovation, with regular interaction with senior management and other departments, alongside access to free hot drinks, a handy tuck shop onsite and a range of local pubs, cafes and dining options nearby helping make every workday enjoyable!
Inside Rebellion
Whichever team you join at Rebellion we are proud of our open, friendly, and creative atmosphere. We love what we do, and we have fun doing it! As a big indie developer, we have complete creative freedom over our titles which allows us to work on a massive variety of projects across all the major platforms.
Find out more about us here
Our size, stability, and the variety of in-house expertise across multiple industries, makes Rebellion completely unique! We work in our own way, and we celebrate that as the key to our success. We foster an inclusive culture where you are encouraged to be yourself, to express your creativity and your talent. We are people focused and will support you in every way to can be the best at what you do. We recognise the importance of enjoying what you do and having a healthy work-life balance. We offer a friendly, creative, and relaxed working atmosphere, with sensibly managed projects and a wide variety of benefits and development opportunities for all our teams to ensure you are fully supported with your physical and Mental Well-being.
We are actively recruiting for a diverse team and continue to add to our culture of growth and inclusion. Rebellion encourages innovation in all areas, and we look forward to hearing how you can help us to be better. We encourage all demographics of culture, gender, ethnicity, neurodiversity and beyond, because a representative team makes better products.
If you are interested in working at Rebellion, but this role doesn’t sound quite like you, we’re recruiting for a range of positions across the studio and we’re always happy to receive speculative applications via our website. Visit our Careers website to view all our live vacancies: Rebellion: Careers
#LI-Hybrid
ai_core_responsibilities: The Lead Game Security Engineer will build and manage a team to develop defenses against cheating and piracy, while owning a process framework for managing security threats from monitoring to mitigation. They will also develop in-house capability for reverse engineering malicious code and embedding security best practices across development teams.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have an extensive track record of successfully delivering anti-cheat and DRM functionality for C++ software in a senior or leadership role, coupled with strong expertise in implementing these technologies. Demonstrable background in reverse engineering game cheats and abuse vectors, along with deep understanding of tools like IDA Pro/Ghidra and file formats (PE/ELF), is required.
linkedin_org_slogan: 30 years of independent games, books, films & comics! Known for Sniper Elite, Zombie Army, Evil Genius, 2000AD & more!
linkedin_org_specialties: PC Game and Mobile Game's  Development
PC Game and Mobile Game Publishing
Book & Graphic Novel Publishing and Board Games
linkedin_org_description:
Founded in 1992, Rebellion is one of Europe’s biggest independent multimedia studios. Its flagship Sniper Elite series is renowned for its authentic stealth and sniping gameplay with more than 20 million players worldwide. 2000 AD is synonymous with the absolute finest in British comic book art. With the acquisition of a $100m film studio and the world’s largest archive of English language comics, Rebellion continues to go from strength to strength.

Rebellion now operates across books, comics, TV and film, but at its core it’s still a leading developer and publisher of games. Whether it’s the breathtaking intensity of Sniper Elite 4, the face-hugging terror of Aliens vs. Predator or the grindhouse frenzy of the Zombie Army series, the Oxford-based studio is revered for creating stand-out games designed to thrill.

linkedin_org_description:
Founded in 1992, Rebellion is one of Europe’s biggest independent multimedia studios. Its flagship Sniper Elite series is renowned for its authentic stealth and sniping gameplay with more than 20 million players worldwide. 2000 AD is synonymous with the absolute finest in British comic book art. With the acquisition of a $100m film studio and the world’s largest archive of English language comics, Rebellion continues to go from strength to strength.

Rebellion now operates across books, comics, TV and film, but at its core it’s still a leading developer and publisher of games. Whether it’s the breathtaking intensity of Sniper Elite 4, the face-hugging terror of Aliens vs. Predator or the grindhouse frenzy of the Zombie Army series, the Oxford-based studio is revered for creating stand-out games designed to thrill.

title: Lead Game Security Engineer
description_text:
We want you to #JOINTHEREBELLION! 
For 30 years we’ve been independently developing and publishing incredible video games at our multiple studios founded by Jason & Chris Kingsley, but Rebellion is more than just games. We have our own film studio, we create board games, publish books, and through 2000AD, publish comics and graphic novels such as the amazing Judge Dredd.
We’re hiring a Lead Game Security Engineer to join at the start of a large new project, with the opportunity to shape the security architecture used across all Asura titles and build a new Game Security team from the ground up.
Based within our in-house Tech Team, you will benefit from working closely with other engineering and project teams to research, reverse engineer, design and implement solutions that deliver robust defences against cheating, piracy, and other attacks, protecting both the player experience and the business as threats and tactics evolve.
Responsibilities:
Build and manage a team of developers and analysts to develop and maintain software to defend against cheating, piracy and other threats.
Develop and own process framework which encompasses the whole lifecycle of managing security threats from monitoring, investigation and identification through to successful mitigation.
Develop in-house capability for the utilisation of reverse engineering and other techniques to analyse and report on malicious code.
Work with broader code teams to establish a development environment in which security best practices are embedded.
Supporting the QA department in building the capability to validate and safely release defensive software.
We believe in the power of face-to-face collaboration and encourage working from one of our studios and can provide a relocation package, including moving assistance, temporary accommodation, and full support to ensure a smooth transition to your new environment.
However, we understand that flexibility matters, so we’re open to discussing hybrid options based on individual needs. 
Extensive track record of safely and successfully delivering anti-cheat and DRM functionality for C++ software in a senior or leadership role
Strong expertise in implementing anti-cheat techniques and digital rights management technologies and the ability to further develop that expertise in team members.
Demonstrable background and experience in reverse engineering and analysing game cheats, digital rights management circumvention and other similar abuse vectors
Deep understanding of relevant technical tools and standards (for instance PE and ELF file formats and software such as IDA Pro or Ghidra)
Nice to have:
Experience shipping or operating online/multiplayer/live-service games at scale. 
Knowledge of cryptography and network protocols, plus tools such as OpenSSL and Wireshark. 
Published security research, responsible disclosure, or public white-hat work. 
Familiarity with the Windows Resiliency Initiative.
We offer an extensive benefits package to our team including: 
22 days holidays + Christmas closure (typically 4 days) & Bank holidays (increasing with service at 5 years – one day each year until you reach 31 days)
Private Medical Insurance, healthcare cash plan, including dental and Vision
Life Assurance, Income Protection & Critical Illness Cover
Enhanced Family Leave 
Interest Free, Tax-Free loans
Enhanced Pension Scheme
EAP a range of Mental Health and Wellbeing Support 
Plus loads more… including a wide range of discounts, freebies, and social events! 
Right to Work Statement
This role is only open to applicants who have the permanent right to work in the UK. We are unable to provide or take over visa sponsorship, either now or in the future. Applicants must therefore be able to demonstrate their ongoing eligibility to work in the UK without the need for employer sponsorship.
Life at Our Oxford HQ
Our riverside headquarters in Oxford places you a short walk away from the city centre. Renowned for its rich historical backdrop and esteemed educational institutions, Oxford offers a unique blend of tradition and modernity, with its beautiful architecture and green spaces.
Oxford also boasts excellent transport links, making it easy to navigate both the city and the wider country. The city’s train station, just a short walk from our studio, offers frequent services to London, as well as direct routes to major cities like Birmingham, Manchester, and Reading and we also offer free parking at the studio.
Our open-plan office promotes teamwork and innovation, with regular interaction with senior management and other departments, alongside access to free hot drinks, a handy tuck shop onsite and a range of local pubs, cafes and dining options nearby helping make every workday enjoyable!
Inside Rebellion
Whichever team you join at Rebellion we are proud of our open, friendly, and creative atmosphere. We love what we do, and we have fun doing it! As a big indie developer, we have complete creative freedom over our titles which allows us to work on a massive variety of projects across all the major platforms.
Find out more about us here
Our size, stability, and the variety of in-house expertise across multiple industries, makes Rebellion completely unique! We work in our own way, and we celebrate that as the key to our success. We foster an inclusive culture where you are encouraged to be yourself, to express your creativity and your talent. We are people focused and will support you in every way to can be the best at what you do. We recognise the importance of enjoying what you do and having a healthy work-life balance. We offer a friendly, creative, and relaxed working atmosphere, with sensibly managed projects and a wide variety of benefits and development opportunities for all our teams to ensure you are fully supported with your physical and Mental Well-being.
We are actively recruiting for a diverse team and continue to add to our culture of growth and inclusion. Rebellion encourages innovation in all areas, and we look forward to hearing how you can help us to be better. We encourage all demographics of culture, gender, ethnicity, neurodiversity and beyond, because a representative team makes better products.
If you are interested in working at Rebellion, but this role doesn’t sound quite like you, we’re recruiting for a range of positions across the studio and we’re always happy to receive speculative applications via our website. Visit our Careers website to view all our live vacancies: Rebellion: Careers

title: GCSE English Tutor
description_text:
Make a Real Impact as a GCSE English Tutor.
Are you a passionate educator, making a difference in the lives of students with SEN or SEMH needs? We are looking for experienced and dedicated tutors. You’ll provide personalised, 1:1 support in English for GCSE students. These in-person sessions in Gillingham offer the chance to work closely with students, helping them build skills and confidence in a supportive and tailored learning environment.
This job is in person in the Gillingham area.
Days: Monday & Tuesday
Times: During school hours 
Subject and Level: GCSE English
Contract length: 8 weeks (possibility to extend)
Rate of pay: £32.50 / hour
What You'll Do
Provide tuition that is appropriate for the individual needs and study level.
Plan engaging lessons tailored to the unique needs of each student.
Provide targeted support for students.
Assess barriers to learning and create a positive and supportive learning environment.
Monitor progress, produce reports and adapt teaching strategies to achieve measurable outcomes.
Maintaining up-to-date knowledge of the curriculum content and qualification frameworks you're providing subject tuition in.
Regularly reporting updates to the Tuition Programmes Manager.
We're looking for someone who has
A Bachelor’s degree.
1+ years of tutoring / teaching experience. 
Experience working with students with SEN and/or SEMH needs.
An ability to adapt lessons to suit different learning styles and needs.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
The right to be self employed in the UK.
What We Offer
A friendly, dynamic team that values collaboration and personal growth.
The opportunity to make a difference in the lives of students.
Competitive hourly rate.
ai_core_responsibilities: Provide personalized, 1:1 support in English for GCSE students, planning engaging lessons tailored to their unique needs. Monitor progress, assess barriers to learning, and create a supportive learning environment.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree and at least 1 year of tutoring or teaching experience, particularly with students who have SEN or SEMH needs. Excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt lessons to different learning styles are also required.
linkedin_org_locations: 3-10a Bradbury Street, Unit 101/102, London, England N16 8JN, GB
linkedin_org_description:
At Tutors Green, we connect students with exceptional tutors. 

We believe every student deserves the chance to succeed, no matter their background. That's why we partner with schools, local authorities, and charities to ensure equal access to top-notch education.

Since 2015, we've helped thousands of students build confidence and achieve their academic goals through personalised tuition programs. Our success comes from our unique approach: we work with a select group of expert tutors, carefully match each student with the right tutor, and provide regular feedback and reporting to ensure every student thrives.

Join Our Team

Are you passionate about helping students learn and succeed? 

We’re always looking for dedicated tutors to join our team.

Visit our tutor sign-up page (https://secure.tutorcruncher.com/tutors-green/signup/tutor/) or email your CV to recruitment@tutorsgreen.com to get started.

title: Senior Specialist Hand Surgeon-Government Healthcare Facility
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is excited to announce an opening for a Senior Specialist Hand Surgeon at a prestigious government healthcare facility. In this vital role, you will leverage your advanced skills and expertise in hand surgery to provide exceptional care within a governmental framework, supporting the health needs of the community.
As a Senior Specialist Hand Surgeon, you will be responsible for managing a diverse range of patients, performing complex surgical procedures, and contributing to public health initiatives. You'll have the opportunity to work alongside a dedicated team of healthcare professionals, fostering an environment of collaboration and excellence.
Responsibilities:
Conduct thorough evaluations and provide surgical treatments for patients with various hand and upper extremity conditions.
Perform advanced surgical procedures, including trauma surgeries, reconstructions, and microsurgeries.
Mentor junior surgeons and medical staff, sharing your knowledge and best practices.
Collaborate with other specialists to optimize patient outcomes and coordinate multidisciplinary care.
Contribute to the healthcare facility's outreach programs and public health initiatives.
Participate in research activities and continuous education to advance the field of hand surgery.
Medical degree with valid licensing to practice as a Senior Specialist Hand Surgeon.
Completion of an accredited residency in Orthopedic or Plastic Surgery, plus a fellowship in Hand Surgery.
Extensive experience in treating a wide array of hand and upper extremity conditions.
Proven proficiency in performing complex hand surgical procedures.
Strong understanding of government healthcare regulations and practices.
Ability to lead and mentor team members effectively.
Excellent communication skills, with a strong focus on patient engagement and community interaction.
Detail-oriented with the ability to evaluate complex cases and make evidence-based decisions.
Commitment to continued professional development and participation in public health initiatives.
Private Health Insurance
Training & Development
Performance Bonus
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Senior Specialist Hand Surgeon, you will conduct evaluations and provide surgical treatments for patients with hand and upper extremity conditions. You will also mentor junior surgeons and collaborate with other specialists to optimize patient outcomes.

Extensive experience in treating hand conditions and proficiency in complex surgical procedures is required.

title: Performance Marketing Manager, Ogilvy One (Ref.0102602)
description_text:
Ogilvy Greece seeks to recruit a Performance Marketing Manager to join its award-winning team and one of its fastest-growing units. The candidate will be responsible for developing and managing successful digital marketing campaigns across various channels, including SEM, Paid Social, Display & Programmatic advertising. Additionally, the candidate will be involved in SEO and Analytics projects. 
The manager will work closely with clients and internal teams to deliver measurable results, optimize campaign performance, and stay at the forefront of industry trends. 
4-5 years of experience in digital marketing or performance media (agency or client side). 
Proven experience managing campaigns on Google Ads, Meta platforms, display advertising, and programmatic channels (e.g., DV360). 
Strong analytical skills, proficiency in Google Analytics, Web Analytics, and advanced Excel (pivot tables, formulas). 
Highly proficient in reporting through Google Looker Studio. 
Deep knowledge of Google Tag Manager. 
Advanced measurement experience like BLS, Viewability, Cross-Channels efficiencies, etc. 
Experience in SEO including audits, keyword research, and content strategies will be considered a plus. 
Certifications such as Google Ads, Google Analytics, and Facebook Blueprint are highly desirable. 
Excellent communication, presentation, and management skills. 
Fluency in English. 
Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, results-oriented environment. 
Responsibilities
Develop, plan, and execute digital campaigns via platforms such as Google Ads (Search, Display YouTube), Meta (Facebook, Instagram), DV360, LinkedIn, and others. 
Manage daily campaign activities, optimize performance, and ensure that campaigns meet or exceed KPIs and ROI targets. 
Analyze campaign data, prepare detailed reports, interpret insights, and provide recommendations for ongoing optimization. 
Be responsible for team leadership and development. 
Organize day-to-day work for your team, provide guidance & trainings and help them grow. 
Coordinate with creative, data, and client service teams to ensure seamless campaign delivery and alignment with overall marketing objectives. 
Stay up-to-date on the latest industry trends, tools, and performance marketing technologies; evaluate emerging opportunities. 
Manage budgets, billing, and invoicing processes related to digital media campaigns. 
Collaborate with internal and external partners to maximize campaign success. 
Foster a culture of data-driven decision making and continuous improvement within the team. 
A competitive package matching the candidate’s skills and experience.
Private medical health insurance program.
Gain access to the best local and global trainings.
Privileged access to state-of-the-art AI tools (WPP Open).
Great work environment.
Gym/workout membership.
Ogilvy Greece is committed to Equal Employment Opportunity without regard for race, color, national origin, ethnicity, gender, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, or religion.
ai_benefits: Competitive package matching the candidate’s skills and experience
Access to the best local and global trainings
Privileged access to state-of-the-art AI tools (WPP Open)
ai_core_responsibilities: The manager will develop, plan, and execute digital marketing campaigns across platforms like Google Ads, Meta, and DV360, while managing daily activities and optimizing performance to meet KPIs and ROI targets. Responsibilities also include analyzing campaign data, providing insights, leading and developing the team, and coordinating with internal creative and client service teams.

Strong analytical skills, proficiency in Google Analytics, Looker Studio, and Google Tag Manager are essential, along with excellent communication and management abilities.
linkedin_org_slogan: We inspire brands and people to impact the world.
linkedin_org_description:
Ogilvy Greece is a group of 400 professionals passionate about advertising, public relations, technology and social platforms. The company has a history of 45 years and currently is the strongest and most awarded Agency in the country as well as the most awarded Greek agency abroad. Besides winning 1275 Ermis Awards and 63 Effie Awards in Greece, the Agency has won numerous international distinctions, including 8 Cannes Lions, 2 Clio Awards, 1 One Show Pencil, 1 D&AD Pencil, 4 London International Awards, 2 Webby Awards.

Our capabilities range from Brand Strategy and Advertising to Public Relations, Activation & Shopper Marketing, Social & Performance Marketing, Health και Branded Entertainment.

We inspire brands and people to impact the world.

title: Senior Podiatrist
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is seeking an experienced and compassionate Senior Podiatrist to join our esteemed healthcare team. In this pivotal role, you will provide advanced care for patients with a wide range of foot and ankle conditions while mentoring and guiding junior podiatrists and staff.
Your responsibilities will involve performing complex assessments, developing comprehensive treatment plans, conducting surgical procedures, and collaborating with a multidisciplinary team to ensure holistic patient care. Additionally, you will play a key role in the training and development of less experienced podiatrists within the organization.
Key Responsibilities
Conduct advanced assessments and diagnoses of complex foot and ankle conditions
Develop and implement individualized treatment plans, including surgical and non-surgical options
Perform intricate surgical procedures as needed
Mentorship of junior podiatrists and support staff in clinical practices
Provide educational workshops and training sessions for staff and patients
Collaborate with other healthcare professionals to deliver comprehensive patient care
Stay current with advancements in podiatry through continuous education and professional development
To qualify for the Senior Podiatrist position at SearchPlus HR, candidates should possess the following qualifications:
Doctor of Podiatric Medicine (DPM) degree from an accredited institution
Current state license to practice podiatry
Minimum of 5 years of clinical experience in podiatric medicine
Proven expertise in diagnosing and managing complex foot and ankle conditions
Experience in performing advanced surgical procedures
Strong leadership and mentorship abilities
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Commitment to continuous learning and staying current with advancements in the field
Benefits: - As per UAE labour law Salary will be around AED 35000 to 55000.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Senior Podiatrist will conduct advanced assessments and develop comprehensive treatment plans for patients with foot and ankle conditions. They will also mentor junior podiatrists and collaborate with a multidisciplinary team to ensure holistic patient care.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a Doctor of Podiatric Medicine (DPM) degree and a current state license to practice podiatry. A minimum of 5 years of clinical experience in podiatric medicine and proven expertise in managing complex conditions is required.

title: IT Applications & SW Development Leader (Village Roadshow Operations Greece)
description_text:
Antenna Group is a leading international content, media and entertainment organization, owning and operating a diverse portfolio of global media assets across a variety of platforms: Television, Pay TV, OTT, Radio, Cinema Exhibition, Digital, Music, Publishing and Education, throughout Europe, North America and Australia. Antenna Group is currently seeking, to cover the following position:
IT Applications & SW Development Leader (Village Roadshow Operations Greece)
About the Role
Village Roadshow (member of Antenna Group) is a leading entertainment brand, best known for its cinemas, delivering an unparalleled movie-going experience to over 3 million viewers annually.
As we continue to expand our reach and enhance our services, we are looking for a highly technical and hands-on professional to lead our development efforts and manage our key software systems and infrastructure. This role requires a strong blend of technical expertise, team leadership, business analysis acumen, and direct software development/support capability.
Key Responsibilities
Business Analysis & Solutions: Act as the key liaison between IT and business departments to analyze business needs, gather requirements, and translate them into actionable IT system specifications and user stories.
Hands-on SW Development & Customization: Directly engage in the development, modification, and maintenance of internal business applications and interfaces (e.g., reporting tools, internal APIs, custom scripts, web site) primarily using C#/.NET and SQL.
Project Execution: Manage the implementation lifecycle for system enhancements and rollouts, ensuring quality control, rigorous testing, and successful deployment within operational environments.
Process Improvement: Continuously review existing IT processes and applications, proposing and implementing technical solutions to improve efficiency and reduce operational friction.
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.
Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in IT/Software Development, with demonstrable experience in business analysis or requirement gathering.
Mandatory strong practical experience in C#/.NET development and supporting enterprise-level applications.
Expertise in MS SQL Server, including advanced T-SQL scripting, performance tuning, and database administration fundamentals.
Proven experience supporting and troubleshooting retail or high-volume transactional POS/Ticketing systems is essential.
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills, with the ability to bridge technical concepts with business realities.
Fluency in both English and Greek (written and spoken).
Competitive remuneration package
Health and Life Insurance Plan
Friendly and challenging working environment
Why Work at Village Roadshow
Village Roadshow offers a collaborative and forward-thinking workplace culture that values innovation, reliability, and cross-functional collaboration. As part of our team, you will play a critical role in ensuring the stability, security, and continuous evolution of our IT systems and infrastructure, enabling seamless operations and supporting both our people and our business growth, while advancing your professional development in a dynamic and evolving industry.
Village Roadshow is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace and welcomes applications from individuals of all backgrounds, ages, genders and identities.
After the screening of the CVs, we will contact the candidates who meet the profile’s requirements to arrange an interview. 
The selected candidates will be invited to attend an initial interview and be informed about further steps. Please note that obtaining references might be part of the selection process. 
All applications are considered as strictly confidential.
ai_core_responsibilities: This role involves acting as the key liaison between IT and business departments to analyze needs, gather requirements, and translate them into system specifications. The leader will also directly engage in the development, modification, and maintenance of internal business applications using C#/.NET and SQL.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in a related technical field and a minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience in IT/Software Development, including business analysis experience. Mandatory requirements include strong practical experience in C#/.NET development, expertise in MS SQL Server, and proven experience supporting retail or high-volume transactional POS/Ticketing systems, along with fluency in English and Greek.

title: Product Marketing Associate
description_text:
SASMAR is looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Product Marketing Associate to join our Product Development team. As a leading pharmaceutical company specializing in personal care and fertility products, including our renowned Conceive Plus brand, we aim to provide innovative solutions that enhance the well-being of our customers worldwide.
In this role, you will assist in the development and execution of product marketing strategies that elevate our brand presence and drive sales growth. Working closely with cross-functional teams, you will contribute to various aspects of product life cycle management, from market research to product launches, ensuring that our offerings resonate with target audiences.
Key Responsibilities
Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify trends and insights that inform product positioning and marketing strategies.
Assist in the development of product marketing materials, including presentations, brochures, and digital content.
Support the execution of go-to-market strategies for new product launches and promotional campaigns.
Collaborate with sales teams to deliver training and support that enhances product knowledge and selling capabilities.
Monitor and analyze product performance metrics, providing regular reports and recommendations for improvement.
Assist in managing marketing budgets and ensuring effective allocation of resources across initiatives.
Participate in cross-functional teams and project groups to drive integrated marketing efforts.
Stay informed about industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging market opportunities.
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
Relevant experience in product marketing, brand management, or a related role is a plus.
Strong analytical skills and proficiency in conducting market research.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Ability to work collaboratively across teams and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
Creative mindset with a passion for developing impactful marketing strategies.
Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite and marketing analysis tools.
Detail-oriented and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment.
Fluency in English; additional languages are a plus.
Competitive salary
English language and multi-cultural work environment
Private Health Insurance (medical, dental, hospitalisation)
Career advancement opportunities in stable company
Modern offices, convenient to public transport.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Product Marketing Associate will assist in developing and executing product marketing strategies to enhance brand presence and drive sales growth for pharmaceutical and personal care products. Key duties include conducting market research, developing marketing materials, supporting product launches, and collaborating with sales teams for training.

Essential skills include strong analytical capabilities, excellent communication, the ability to manage multiple projects, and proficiency in marketing analysis tools.

title: Senior Consultant / Manager - Analytics Consulting - B2B
description_text:
Tiger Analytics is a leading advanced analytics consulting firm, partnering with several Fortune 100 companies to leverage data for creating significant business value. We pride ourselves in our deep expertise in data science, machine learning, and AI, which has earned recognition from notable market research firms, including Forrester and Gartner.
We are seeking a Techno-Functional Analytics Consultant to lead end-to-end client analytics programs. This role sits at the intersection of business strategy, data, and delivery. The consultant will partner closely with client stakeholders to understand business processes and data, co-design analytics solutions, guide hands-on analysis, oversee delivery execution, and clearly articulate business value to executive audiences.
Responsibilities:
Client Engagement & Problem Framing
Lead discovery to understand client business processes, decision workflows, and data landscape
Translate ambiguous business problems into structured analytics questions and solution hypotheses
Facilitate working sessions with client teams to brainstorm solution approaches and trade-offs
Analytics Design & Hands-on Analysis
Perform hands-on exploratory analysis to validate assumptions and inform solution design
Define analytical frameworks, KPIs, and metrics aligned to business outcomes
Guide data modeling, feature selection, and methodological choices in collaboration with the delivery team
Delivery Oversight
Provide functional and technical oversight to the analytics delivery team (data engineers, analysts, data scientists)
Ensure analytical outputs are robust, scalable, and aligned to client decision-making needs
Review outputs for accuracy, clarity, and business relevance
Executive Communication & Value Ownership
Synthesize complex analysis into clear, executive-level narratives and recommendations

title: Financial Controller SWOT Hospitality
description_text:
Job Summary
The Financial Controller at SWOT Hospitality Management Company plays a vital role in maintaining the fiscal integrity of our diverse portfolio of hospitality services. This strategic position will oversee all financial operations, ensure compliance with relevant regulations, and provide pivotal financial insights that help shape our company’s future.
As a Financial Controller, you will be responsible for the preparation and supervision of budgets, reports, and audits, offering guidance and analysis to the executive team. Your efforts will directly impact our operational efficiency and financial health, making your role critical for our success in the competitive hospitality sector.
We seek a detail-oriented professional with strong analytical skills and leadership capabilities to drive our financial strategy.
Key Responsibilities
Maintain accurate financial records, including profit and loss, balance sheets, and cash flow statements.
Lead the budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes across all divisions.
Monitor financial performance and conduct variance analysis to guide corrective actions.
Manage accounting operations, ensuring compliance with financial regulations and standards.
Communicate financial insights and strategic recommendations effectively to stakeholders.
Coordinate audits and ensure timely tax filings, maintaining strong relationships with external auditors and regulatory bodies.
Develop and implement financial controls and strategies to mitigate risks.
Supervise and mentor finance team members, fostering a collaborative and high-performance culture.
Provide support in decision-making through detailed financial analysis and modeling.
Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field (CPA or equivalent certification preferred).
Minimum of 1 year of experience in a finance leadership role, preferably in the hospitality industry.
Strong knowledge of accounting principles, financial analysis, and reporting.
Proven ability to develop strategic financial plans and manage budgets effectively.
Expertise in financial management software and Microsoft Excel.
Exceptional analytical and problem-solving skills.
Strong leadership abilities and team management experience.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Detail-oriented with the ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines.
Fluency in English; knowledge of additional languages is an asset.
Competitive renumeration package 
Dynamic, friendly and supportive working environment
Strong Internal Mobility & Career Advancement Opportunities within SWOT Hospitality 
Wellbeing Matters: Work-Life Balance Initiatives 
About SWOT Hospitality 
We are a leading Hospitality Management Company in Greece and an approved white flag operator of Hyatt, Marriot International, Accor Hotels, Hilton, Nikki Beach, Worldwide and IHG Hotels & Resorts.
We are laser focused on hospitality strategic and financial advisory with an impeccable trach record.
We will give you the opportunity to work with the best practitioners from Greek hospitality market.
We offer stability and career prospects in a transparent working environment.
We work with the best professionals in the tourism industry.
ai_benefits: Dynamic, friendly and supportive working environment
Strong internal mobility & career advancement opportunities
ai_core_responsibilities: The Financial Controller will oversee all financial operations, ensuring fiscal integrity, compliance, and providing pivotal financial insights to shape the company’s future. Key duties include preparing and supervising budgets, reports, and audits, and guiding the executive team with analysis.

In the capacity of Senior Specialist Urologist, you will be responsible for diagnosing and treating a variety of urological disorders, including conditions affecting the kidneys, bladder, urethra, and male reproductive organs. Your expertise will contribute significantly to the development of treatment pathways and the advancement of patient care standards within the facility.
Responsibilities

Collaborate with a multidisciplinary team to provide comprehensive care and treatment for urological patients.
Educate patients and their families about various urological conditions, treatment options, and preventive measures.
Stay updated on the latest developments in urology and integrate new therapeutic approaches into practice.
Medical degree with specialization in Urology and a valid medical license to practice.
Extensive experience as a practicing Urologist, particularly within a private healthcare setting.
Strong expertise in diagnosing and managing a wide range of urological conditions and performing advanced surgical procedures.
Excellent communication skills to effectively interact with patients, families, and the healthcare team.
Demonstrated leadership abilities with experience in mentoring and guiding junior medical staff.
Proven track record of delivering high-quality patient care and effective treatment outcomes.
Strong organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple cases and priorities simultaneously.
A commitment to continuing education and professional development in the field of urology.

title: Product Growth Marketing Manager
description_text:
Why this role, why now
At Mention Me, we help customer-obsessed brands turn their superfans into a scalable, profitable growth engine. As our platform evolves to deliver smarter, AI-powered advocacy solutions, product-led growth is becoming a core revenue driver.
We’re looking for a Product Growth Marketing Manager to sit inside our Growth/ Business Unit team and act as the marketing owner of in-product revenue growth. This role is for someone who thrives at the intersection of product, data, and commercial outcomes—using insight, experimentation, and messaging to drive adoption, expansion, and monetisation through the product itself .
The role
You will be the marketing counterpart on the Growth/ Business unit team, responsible for shaping how customers discover, adopt, and expand their usage of Mention Me via the product experience on ecommerce marketplaces. This person would also have ownership and accountability for delivering the pipe required through this channel via the products . 
This is not a traditional launch-led or sales-enablement PMM role. Instead, you’ll:
Drive pipe growth, messaging, positioning, activation, feature adoption, expansion, and upsell
Influence roadmap priorities through growth insights
Translate customer behaviour into experiments that unlock revenue
You’ll work day-to-day with Product, Engineering, Data, Demand Generation, Sales, and Customer Success, owning growth initiatives end-to-end—from hypothesis to impact.
What you’ll be doing
Core responsibilities & outcomes
Drive revenue through product
Own product-led growth initiatives that drive revenue by increasing activation, adoption, expansion, and net new ARR
Identify and execute opportunities for in-product upsell, cross-sell, and packaging optimisation
Partner with Sales and CS to align product-led motions with commercial plays
Lead experimentation & optimisation
Define growth hypotheses based on user behaviour, funnel analysis, and customer insight
Design and run experiments across onboarding, in-product messaging, feature discovery, and pricing.
Use data to measure impact, iterate quickly, and scale what works
Own in-product messaging & positioning
Develop clear, compelling in-product value narratives that drive action
Ensure the right message reaches the right user at the right moment in the journey
Translate complex product value into simple, outcome-focused language
Be the voice of the customer in the Growth team
Stay close to customers to understand needs, objections, and moments of friction
Feed insights into roadmap prioritisation and growth opportunities
Continuously refine personas, JTBD, and lifecycle stages based on real usage
Collaborate cross-functionally
Work closely with Product Managers and Engineers to ship growth initiatives
Partner with Data to define success metrics and dashboards
Align with Marketing on lifecycle, campaigns, and narrative consistency
What success looks like
Increased activation and feature adoption rates resulting in increased revenue 
Measurable uplift in product-led revenue (expansion, upsell, cross-sell)
Faster time-to-value for new customers
Scalable, repeatable growth experiments embedded into how the product is built
We’d love to hear from you if you have
5+ years’ experience in product growth, growth marketing, or product marketing with strong commercial acumen
Proven experience driving commercial outcomes through product changes
Strong analytical mindset—comfortable working with data, funnels, and experimentation
Experience collaborating closely with Product and Engineering teams
Ability to translate insight into action and narrative into behaviour
A customer-first mindset with a bias toward impact over output
(B2B SaaS experience strongly preferred)
What this role is not
Not a pure launch or sales-enablement role
Not focused on top-of-funnel demand generation
Not a traditional “PMM sitting in Marketing only” role
This is a hands-on growth role embedded in product, with direct accountability for revenue impact.
Interview process
1st stage: Hiring Manager call (25 mins)
2nd stage: VP Marketing interview (25 mins)
3rd stage: In-person task interview with Growth & Commercial leaders (1 hour)
Here are some of our favourite perks and benefits, but we have so many more!
Hybrid working
Private medical insurance with Vitality, including enhanced mental wellbeing support, dental and vision policies and a range of lifestyle benefits and great incentives
Life insurance
Two Celebration Days; additional time off for you to celebrate religious days, cultural events, birthdays, anniversaries, or any other significant day that’s important to you
Enhanced parental leave
25 days annual leave (plus public holidays), increasing over your time as a Mentioneer
Up-to-date tech you’ll need (we love Macs)
ai_core_responsibilities: The Product Growth Marketing Manager will drive revenue through product-led growth initiatives, focusing on increasing activation, adoption, and expansion. They will also lead experimentation and optimization efforts to enhance in-product messaging and positioning.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 5+ years of experience in product growth or marketing with a strong analytical mindset. Proven experience in driving commercial outcomes through product changes and collaboration with Product and Engineering teams is essential.

title: Junior Consultant Pediatric Surgeon
locations_alt_raw: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
locations_derived: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is excited to offer a position for a Junior Consultant Pediatric Surgeon to join our dedicated team. In this early-career role, you will have the opportunity to work alongside experienced surgeons in providing surgical care for infants, children, and adolescents. This role is designed for a motivated individual who is eager to develop their skills in a supportive and dynamic environment.
As a Junior Consultant Pediatric Surgeon, you will assist in diagnosing surgical conditions, performing surgical procedures, and collaborating with a multidisciplinary team to ensure high-quality pediatric care. You will also engage with patients and their families to provide education and support throughout the treatment process.
Key Responsibilities:
Assist in the evaluation and assessment of pediatric patients requiring surgical intervention.
Participate in surgical procedures under the supervision of senior surgeons.
Contribute to the development of treatment plans in collaboration with the surgical team.
Provide postoperative care and monitor patients during their recovery.
Engage with families to explain surgical procedures and postoperative care instructions.
Participate in clinical meetings, case discussions, and educational activities to enhance professional development.
Stay updated with advancements in pediatric surgery through continuous learning and participation in relevant training.
Qualifications:
M.D. or D.O. degree with completion of a residency in general surgery.
Interest in pursuing a fellowship in pediatric surgery (or currently enrolled in a fellowship program).
Active medical license in the respective state.
Strong communication skills and a compassionate approach to patient care.
Ability to work effectively as part of a multidisciplinary team.
Desire for professional growth and active participation in continuing medical education.
Strong problem-solving skills and adaptability in a fast-paced healthcare environment.
Good salary packages plus other standard benefits like accommodation, annual air tickets, family benefits, medical insurance, etc.

title: Finance Assistant
description_text:
Millennium Gloucester Hotel London Kensington is seeking a Finance Assistant who will be responsible for assisting in the daily running of the finance department for two hotels, ensuring that all M&C procedures and targets are met.
The Finance Assistant Key Responsibilities will include:
To fully audit and reconcile all revenues and statistics posted via PMS and issue daily revenue report to management on a timely basis.
Check and ensure appropriate backup for all allowances and rebates and ensure departmental approval.
Ensure that the figures produced by the department are accurate, reliable and timely. 
Ensure that the daily/weekly/monthly revenue reports are completed and sent to Hotel Management and Corporate Office within specified deadlines.
To ensure book-outs are accounted for correctly.
Reconcile F&B revenue from Micros with Opera PMS to ensure all postings and revenue is captured. 
The Experience & Qualifications for Finance Assistant:
Excellent attention to detail and accuracy.
Excellent written/verbal communication and the ability to communicate across all levels of an organization.
Confident individual who is adept in prioritising and managing multiple projects and tasks simultaneously.
Ability to take the initiative and deal with unexpected situations and last minute changes.
Ability to deal with sensitive and confidential data.
The successful candidate will be:
Enthusiastic, self-motivated, proactive, resourceful with excellent attention to detail
Demonstrate excellent presentation, negotiation and communication skills with the customers and other hotel departments
Team worker
Ability to work under pressure in a fast pace environment
About the Hotel
The Millennium Gloucester Hotel London Kensington is an impressive 4-star deluxe hotel in the heart of charming Kensington and a minutes’ walk to Gloucester Road Underground station, allowing convenient access around London.
The hotel boasts 610 spacious guest rooms and Guests will be spoilt for choice with the array of dining facilities available, including the hugely popular Humphrey’s Café & Bar, South West 7 and the Bombay Brasserie.
The hotel is also home to the Millennium Conference Centre which is the perfect place to host your event, with a variety of flexible meeting spaces, including 26 versatile function rooms covering a total of 1,600m2 and the capacity to accommodate up to 600 delegates. The impressive conservatory can cater for up to 300 guests and features palm trees, a piano, exclusive bar area and dance floor.
About the Group
Millennium Hotels and Resorts owns and operates a portfolio of over 120 hotels worldwide. In Europe, our 21 hotels provide the perfect gateway to explore landmark locations, with many iconic attractions and business hubs close by.
Properties under the group are placed into four collections; Leng’s Collection, M Social Collection, Millennium Collection and Copthorne Collection. Each collection has its own distinct personality, character and clearly defined hotel brands within it; tailored to suit different types of guests
For you
We offer a benefits package including: 
Social Events, Wellbeing and Team Activities
Training and development
Cash Health Plan cover option available 
Pension Salary Sacrifice Scheme
Career development and salary reviews
Interest free Season Ticket Loan Scheme
1 Volunteer Days per year (fully paid and in addition to your annual leave) 
Complimentary meals prepared for you by our chefs 
Length of Service related holiday scheme
My Millennium discount perks 
Discount on Accommodation worldwide and 50% Food and Beverage Outlets
Life Assurance
Recommend a Friend Scheme
.... As well as real opportunities to develop and gain promotion within the industry. 
We are an equal opportunities employer.
