title: Coordinateur Acquisition et Engagement de Donateurs (H/F/X) - Luxembourg
description_text:
Lieu : Luxembourg (Luxembourg-Ville)
Type de contrat : CDI
Date de prise de poste : 01.04.2026
Date limite dépôt de candidature : 28.02.2026
Handicap International (HI) est une organisation de solidarité internationale indépendante et impartiale, qui intervient dans les situations de pauvreté et d’exclusion, de conflits et de catastrophes. OEuvrant aux côtés des personnes handicapées et des populations vulnérables, elle agit et témoigne, pour répondre à leurs besoins essentiels, pour améliorer leurs conditions de vie et promouvoir le respect de leur dignité et de leurs droits fondamentaux.
Présente dans 58 pays, HI met en oeuvre des activités au service des populations vulnérables, des populations réfugiées, déplacées et sinistrées, des personnes victimes de blessures et des populations exposées au danger des armes, munitions et engins explosifs.
Contexte et rôle
En tant que Coordinateur·rice Acquisition et Engagement des Donateurs, placé·e sous la responsabilité du Marketing Manager, vous contribuez directement à l'acquisition et à la fidélisation des donateurs de Handicap International Luxembourg, tout en garantissant une relation donateur de qualité, humaine et engagée. Pour cela, vous déployez, coordonnez et optimisez différents canaux d’acquisition et d’engagement.
Vous intégrez une organisation à taille humaine d’environ 20 personnes, avec lesquelles vous travaillerez de manière transversale.
Afin d’identifier et de saisir les opportunités, et de maximiser l’efficacité de vos actions, vous travaillerez également de manière transversale avec le département Philanthropie et Partenariats, et de manière articulée avec les départements Communication, ECM (Éducation à la Citoyenneté Mondiale) et Projets de développement et d’aide d’urgence.
Missions principales :
• Mettre en oeuvre et coordonner les actions de recrutement de nouveaux donateurs sur le terrain (porte-à-porte, lieux privés, événements, actions ciblées en entreprises ou écoles).
• Déployer des campagnes de télémarketing (réactivation, qualification de leads, welcome calls, engagement post-premier don).
• Développer la lifetime value des donateurs à travers des campagnes de rétention, de traitement des incidents de paiement, de transformation de donateurs ponctuels en réguliers et d’upgrade.
• Concevoir, tester et améliorer les outils opérationnels (scripts, argumentaires, supports).
• Suivre, analyser et optimiser les performances des actions menées.
• Produire des comptes rendus d’activité et des analyses opérationnelles.
• Assurer une relation donateur de qualité, en traitant les sollicitations via divers canaux (téléphone, email, courrier) et en veillant à une expérience positive à chaque interaction.
• Appuyer de manière transversale les actions et événements menées par les autres services pour être au contact de nos publics
Vous disposez d’une expérience confirmée dans une fonction commerciale, de développement ou de collecte, incluant du contact terrain et du télémarketing.
• Vous maîtrisez les techniques de vente, d’argumentation et de mobilisation, et êtes à l’aise avec les outils de bureautique, les outils CRM et le suivi des résultats.
• Vous êtes autonome, rigoureux·se et organisé·e, avec un fort sens des priorités.
• Vous avez une excellente aisance relationnelle, un sens du service développé et savez écouter, convaincre et créer de la relation dans la durée.
• Vous disposez de capacités d’analyse, de structuration et de restitution des résultats.
• Vous savez structurer, organiser et diffuser des pratiques opérationnelles.
• Une expérience dans le secteur associatif, humanitaire ou de l’économie sociale et solidaire est préférée.
• Votre motivation et votre adhésion aux valeurs de HI feront la différence.
• Vous parlez couramment le français ainsi que l’anglais. La pratique de l’Allemand et/ou du Luxembourgeois est un atout
Ce que nous vous proposons :
• Un poste qui contribue directement à l’impact d’une organisation reconnue comme Handicap International Luxembourg, au sein d’équipes engagées et complémentaires.
• Un rôle central, en lien étroit avec le Marketing Manager et articulé avec l’ensemble des départements de l’organisation.
• Des missions variées, entre activités en extérieur et travail de bureau.
• Un environnement de travail à taille humaine, favorisant l’autonomie, la prise d’initiative et la responsabilité.
Conditions du poste :
• Salaire : en fonction du profil.
• Tickets restaurant, 13e mois.
Si vous souhaitez nous rejoindre, nous vous invitons à postuler via l’adresse suivante : rh.lux@hi.org
ai_core_responsibilities: The Coordinator will implement and coordinate new donor recruitment actions across various channels, including face-to-face and telemarketing, while developing donor lifetime value through retention and upgrade campaigns. They are also responsible for ensuring high-quality donor relations by managing solicitations across multiple channels and optimizing operational tools.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have proven experience in a commercial, development, or fundraising role that includes field contact and telemarketing, mastering sales and argumentation techniques, and being proficient with CRM tools. linkedin_org_locations: 138 avenue des Frères Lumière, Lyon, 69008, FR
linkedin_org_description: Humanity & Inclusion is an international organisation specialised in the field of disability.  Non-governmental, non-religious, non-political and non-profit making, it works alongside people with disabilities, whatever the context, offering them assistance and supporting them in their efforts to become self-reliant. title: Freelance Automotive Engineer with Python Experience - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design graduate- and industry-level automotive engineering problems grounded in real practice; 
Evaluate AI-generated solutions for correctness, assumptions, and engineering logic; 
Validate analytical or numerical results using Python (NumPy, SciPy, Pandas); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with first principles and accepted engineering standards; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to assess multi-step problem solving. 
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for automotive engineers with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Automotive Engineering or related fields, e.g. Mechatronics, Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, etc. 
3+ years of professional automotive engineering experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., PE, CEng, PMP) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $15/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will design automotive engineering problems and evaluate AI-generated solutions for correctness. They will also validate results using Python and improve AI reasoning to align with engineering standards.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a degree in Automotive Engineering or related fields and at least 3 years of professional experience. Strong proficiency in Python and written English at a C1/C2 level is also required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Be the “I” in AI with Mindrift. Work from anywhere on groundbreaking AI projects
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: Cleaner, Nutley Edge Cottages, East Sussex
description_text:
About Outward
For 50 years, Outward has been providing high-quality support and care services to vulnerable people across London, predominantly in North and East London. Established by families seeking alternatives to institutional care, we’ve grown into a respected provider of person-centred support for adults with learning disabilities, autism, mental health needs and complex needs. We support over 1,000 people across nine boroughs, guided by our core values: engage, enable and empower, and we work in partnership with individuals and their families to promote choice, control and inclusion.
Outward is proud to be an accredited Living Wage Employer. This means we are committed to paying the Real Living Wage – not just the government minimum or national living wage – to our frontline Support Workers and other eligible staff. We recognise the value of the work our teams do, and we are committed to ensuring fair pay that reflects the true cost of living. The Real Living Wage is updated annually by the Living Wage Foundation, and Outward remains committed to aligning our pay accordingly.
Join our friendly team at Nutley Edge, a beautiful holiday destination nestled in the heart of East Sussex, where you'll play a crucial role in maintaining the cleanliness and welcoming atmosphere of our charming self-catering holiday lets. Simply put, your efforts will help create memorable stays for our guests, supporting individuals with learning disabilities as well as general holidaymakers.
Contract – Flexible Zero Hours 
Salary: 12.98 per hour
Location: Nutley Edge , East Sussex, TN22
Your Mission: As a cleaner at Nutley Edge, you will ensure that every corner of our cottages shines, creating a lovely and hygienic environment for our guests. We are looking for someone dedicated to cleanliness and attention to detail, who takes pride in their work and truly cares about guest experience.
By joining Outward, you're not just taking a job; you're becoming part of a community that values dignity and support for all. Your contribution will make a real difference in the lives of those who stay with us!
Your Responsibilities 
As a cleaner you will:
General cleaning throughout our fourteen self-catering cottages - following a check list
Play a key role in ensuring that all accommodation is cleaned to a high standard and all health and safety aspects adhered to.
Ensure any areas of concern including Health and Safety issues are reported to management in a timely manner
Requirements:Essential Criteria
Must be able to work on own initiative.
Must be able to carry out job role to a high standard
Must be able to carry out physical tasks.
Staff must have access to a smartphone capable of receiving SMS messages and installing authentication apps for secure systems access 
Right to Work in the UK. Please note: Outward will not provide visa sponsorship. 
Desirable Criteria 
Knowledge of COSHH and any other health and Safety 
How to Apply:
If you think this role sounds like a perfect fit for you, we want to hear from you! Please submit your CV along with a statement highlighting how your experiences align with our requirements. This is an ongoing recruitment process, so don’t delay—apply today and help us make Nutley Edge a welcoming home away from home!
We value everything our staff do for the people we support, so we provide a great benefits package:
25 days Annual Leave excluding Bank Holidays (pro rata for part time)
Comprehensive Learning & Development Programme
Cycle-to-Work Scheme
Death in Service Benefit
Health Assured – Employee Assistance Programme
Eye care Vouchers
Flu Jab Reimbursement
Pension Scheme
Purchase Additional Annual Leave
Refer-a-Friend Scheme
Diversity and Safeguarding: 
We are committed to equal opportunities and welcome applications from all sections of the community.
Outward applies its Equal Opportunities Policy at all stages of recruitment and selection. Shortlisting, interviewing and selection is carried out without regard to gender, sexual orientation, marital status, colour, race, nationality, ethnic or national origins, religion or belief, age or trade union membership. 
As an employer, who aspire to become Disability Confident Committed, we aim to ensure that a fair and proportionate number of disabled applicants that meet the minimum criteria for this position will be offered an interview. Please indicate clearly at the beginning of your supporting statement if you have a disability (as defined by the Equality Act 2010), and you wish to be considered for an Offer Of an Interview (OOI) Please note that the OOI is available to disabled candidates only. Regrettably, any false declaration of disability in order to secure an interview will impact on your overall application.
Outward is committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of adults at risk and expects all staff to share this commitment. If the post you apply for involves working with or having access to adults at risk and/or their records, we will require a DBS for successful candidates.
ai_core_responsibilities: As a cleaner, you will ensure that all fourteen self-catering cottages are cleaned to a high standard, following a checklist. You will also report any health and safety concerns to management in a timely manner.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must be able to work on their own initiative and carry out physical tasks to a high standard. Access to a smartphone for secure systems access and the right to work in the UK are also required.
linkedin_org_locations: 4 Daneland Walk, Hale Village, London, England N17 9FE, GB
linkedin_org_description:
Outward is a forward-thinking and inclusive charity that works across ten London Boroughs to support people to live with dignity and purpose.

We support: people with learning disabilities, including a specialised service that supports people on the autism spectrum, older people, people with mental health issues, and young people at risk.

Our work is diverse, from supporting people to live independently in their own homes to providing safe, secure accommodation and tailored support when and where it is needed. Everything we do is about enabling people to have greater choice, independence and control over how they live their own lives.

title: Short-Form Video Editor
description_text:
VirtueStaff is seeking a versatile and creative video-first professional to join our client's marketing agency. This role is heavily focused on production, with most of the workload dedicated to high-impact video content, supplemented by professional graphic design for static assets. The ideal candidate is an expert in the Adobe Creative Suite who can conceptualize and execute engaging short-form videos and motion graphics specifically tailored for social media advertising.
Responsibilities
Lead the creation of short-form videos optimized for various social media ad platforms
Utilize advanced techniques in After Effects to add dynamic motion graphics to video content, increasing viewer retention and engagement
Design high-quality static assets, including professional email templates and social media advertisements
Collaborate with the marketing team to ensure all creative assets align with current advertisement strategies and brand standards
Manage projects from initial concept through final export, ensuring all technical requirements for social platforms are met
Expert-level proficiency in the Adobe Creative Suite, with specific mastery of Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Photoshop
Proven track record in creating short-form social media advertisements
Advanced video editing and motion graphics capabilities
Strong foundational skills in graphic design for digital layouts
Candidates must demonstrate an ability to produce professional-grade advertisement videos and static designs
Work From Home
Performance Bonus
ai_core_responsibilities: The Short-Form Video Editor will be responsible for editing short video content. This includes working with raw footage to create engaging and polished final products.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have experience in video editing, particularly with short-form content. Familiarity with relevant software and tools is expected.
linkedin_org_slogan: VirtueStaff.  Remote Staffing Redefined.  Your go to option for remote workforce solutions.
linkedin_org_description:
At VirtueStaff, we offer global talent to help organizations scale their businesses while increasing profits and making an impact in the lives of our candidates. 

We screen over 5,000 people per week with a 7 step vetting process, and approve 0.1% of them to work with our clients.

Building Brighter Futures and Better Businesses.

title: Junior QA Specialist
description_text:
About the company:
Melissa Kikizas S.A. is a major Greek company operating in the FMCG industry with leading positions in its categories and strong exporting presence in more than 45 countries. Our main brands are: Melissa, Stella, Primo Gusto, Αvez, Vlaha, and Terra Creta Olive Oil. Additionally, we are the exclusive distributors of KraftHeinz and Del Monte in Greece. With a commitment to excellence and innovation, Melissa Kikizas has received the 3rd position in Great Place to Work awards for 2025.
We are currently looking to recruit a highly motivated and results-driven individual to join our team as a Junior Quality Assurance (QA) Specialist. The successful candidate will be responsible for performing quality control inspections on raw materials and produced pasta products, managing customer and consumer requests and complaints, and actively participating in the design and continuous improvement of the company’s Quality and Food Safety Management System.
Main Responsibilities:
Quality Control
Conducts quality inspections on raw materials and finished products and communicates any non-conformities to suppliers. 
Manages stock release and quarantine procedures when required. 
Performs checks on returned products. 
Carries out laboratory-based, sampling quality controls on products manufactured at the Larissa plant to monitor quality consistency. 
Performs routine shelf-life testing of produced products. 
Conducts comparative analyses of product samples for benchmarking.

Quality Assurance
Manages customer and consumer requests and complaints, including specifications, certificates, and required documentation. 
Communicates quality issues to relevant departments and supports corrective and preventive actions. 
Participates in the development and continuous improvement of the Quality and Food Safety Management System in line with applicable standards.

Other Responsibilities
Supports quality improvement projects and oversees pest control activities at company facilities. 
Ensures proper operation, calibration, and organization of the quality control laboratory, sample archives, and quality documentation.
Bachelor’s degree in Food Science/Food Technology, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or a related field 
Up to 2 years of experience in a Quality Control and/or Quality Assurance role
Excellent knowledge of Greek and English language (verbal & written)
Excellent knowledge of MS Office (Word, PowerPoint, Excel) 
Experience in using laboratory equipment
Strong attention to detail and analytical skills 
Strong organizational skills 
Ability to manage multiple tasks under tight deadlines
Ability to handle complaints and negative feedback effectively 
Strong teamwork and collaboration skills
Competitive remuneration package
Private health insurance
Learning and development opportunities
Rewards and recognition programm for high performing teams and individuals
Melissa Kikizas SA offers equal opportunities to all, regardless of religion, age, nationality, sexual orientation, gender or origin. 
All CVs will be treated with complete confidentiality. The company will only contact candidates whose CVs meet the required qualifications and criteria.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Junior QA Specialist will conduct quality control inspections on raw materials and finished pasta products, manage stock release, and handle customer complaints. They will also actively participate in the development and continuous improvement of the Quality and Food Safety Management System.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Food Science, Food Technology, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or a related field, along with up to 2 years of experience in a Quality Control or Quality Assurance role. Excellent proficiency in both Greek and English, along with strong MS Office skills, is mandatory.
linkedin_org_slogan: We share Greek food and food culture with the world 🍝🌿
linkedin_org_locations: Larissas - Farsalon Rd (5th km), Larissa, 41110, Larissa, GR
linkedin_org_description:
Our company was founded in 1947 due to Alexandros Kikizas’ vision to create a food company that would use solely Greek raw materials, in order to produce high quality products.

Today, seven decades later, the third generation of Kikizas family leads one of the largest food companies in Greece, exporting products to more than 45 countries.

Melissa Kikizas is a major Greek company operating in the FMCG industry with leading position in its categories and strong exporting presence. Our main brands are Melissa, Stella, Primo Gusto, Deveta, Αvez, Vlaha and Terra Creta and we are the exclusive distributors of KRAFT HEINZ and DEL MONTE in Greece. Additionally, the company has achieved the Best Place to Work award for 2011, 2013, 2016, 2017 and 2019.

The vertically-organized mill and pasta plant complex in Larissa produces every year more than 50.000 tons of pasta, which makes us one of the largest pasta producers in the Balkans.

Our presence in the European market is reinforced by the founding of the affiliated company Atlanta S.A., through which we export various Greek products to the Polish market, such as pasta, olive oil, olives, halvah and wines.

title: Full Stack Development Team Lead
description_text:
Huble is an international, creative, digital business & CRM consultancy with Elite HubSpot Partner status. Using the HubSpot platform, we provide solutions to increase our customer's level of CRM sophistication as well as deliver strategic consultancy across marketing, sales, service, websites, and business operations - and we do it all whilst trying to strike a balance between professionalism and being human.
We are looking for a candidate to join our Development team as a highly skilled and experienced HubSpot Full Stack Team Lead, reporting to the Head of Development.
As a team lead, you will manage, mentor, and guide a small team of developers while maintaining hands-on architectural responsibilities. You will play a pivotal role in designing, developing, and maintaining the architecture of solutions on the HubSpot platform, including websites, custom UI extensions, complex workflows, and API integrations. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams—developers, marketing consultants, designers, and project managers—to deliver scalable, innovative solutions. Your expertise will guide technical strategy, ensure best practices for HubSpot development, and bridge business requirements with technical execution. If you thrive in full-stack environments, enjoy working across both frontend and backend, and have a passion for leading and developing teams, we want to hear from you.
🚀 Here are a few of the tasks you'll get to work on
Software Architecture
Architect and design full-stack architectures for HubSpot solutions, ensuring scalability, modularity, and maintainability across both frontend and backend.
Collaborate with project managers, designers, marketing consultants, and developers to translate requirements into technical specifications and implementation plans.
Lead the development of both frontend components and backend integrations using modern technologies, frameworks, and best practices.
Provide technical guidance and mentorship to frontend and backend developers, fostering a culture of excellence and continuous improvement.
Conduct code reviews and provide feedback to ensure quality, adherence to standards, and performance optimization across the stack.
Stay updated with the latest technologies, HubSpot features, trends, and industry best practices, recommending new tools and techniques for adoption.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive innovation, enhance user experience, and deliver high-quality integrated solutions.
Identify and mitigate technical risks and challenges, proposing alternative solutions and contingency plans as needed.
Participate in architectural discussions, providing insights and recommendations to improve system design, performance, and maintainability.
Work closely with the pre-sales team to scope solutions and assess the feasibility of prospective client projects.
Maintain strong proficiency in HubSpot features and functionality, focusing on extending native capabilities through custom software, APIs, and integrations.
Team Management
Lead and manage a team of developers, providing technical guidance, mentorship, and career development support
Work together with your team members to provide feedback, support professional growth, and address concerns
Allocate and distribute work among team members based on skills, experience, and development goals
Create detailed technical briefs and implementation plans for the development team
Act as the primary technical interface between your development team and other stakeholders
Work with the Project Management and Resource Management teams to manage team capacity, workload, and deadlines to ensure efficient delivery of projects
Foster a positive team culture that promotes learning, innovation, and continuous improvement
Review the the outputs delivered by you and your team, ensure a high quality of delivery
🏗️ To excel in this role, you should have the following
Relevant qualification in computer science, software engineering, or related field.
8+ years of full-stack development experience with proficiency in both frontend technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks like React or Angular) and backend technologies (Node.js, Python, or PHP).
2+ years of team leadership or technical team lead experience
Experience in managing, mentoring, and developing technical team members
Strong team management and delegation skills
Experience in creating technical briefs and implementation plans for development teams
Proven track record of successfully leading technical projects and teams
Ability to balance hands-on technical work with team management responsibilities
Proven architecture experience in designing end-to-end systems, including both frontend components and backend services.
Understanding of architectural patterns such as component-based design, state management, and microservices.
Extensive experience with development tools, build systems, version control, and CI/CD pipelines.
Proficiency with RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and the ability to develop, consume, and validate APIs effectively.
Solid understanding of both frontend and backend performance optimization techniques and best practices.
Experience in developing responsive and mobile-first web applications with seamless backend integrations.
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to tackle complex technical challenges across the entire stack.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, working effectively with cross-functional teams, clients, and stakeholders.
Proven ability to gather, interpret, and implement functional and non-functional requirements for scalable, maintainable applications.
Keeping up-to-date with new technologies, frameworks, and best practices across both frontend and backend development.
In-depth knowledge of HubSpot’s products, APIs, and platform with a focus on custom extensions and integrations.
⚡️ These personal qualities are key to your success
Excellent communication skills and an ability to communicate with a broad range of stakeholders from clients, prospects, team members, the leadership team and senior management.
Strong leadership skills with the ability to motivate and inspire team members
Excellent mentoring and coaching abilities
Ability to provide constructive feedback and handle difficult conversations professionally
Strong emotional intelligence and empathy in managing team dynamics
Ability to prioritize and manage multiple competing demands while supporting team members
Excellent problem solving capability. None of our solutions are one-size-fits-all, every one of our customers have unique requirements which require creative problem solving.
Ability to translate your ideas and solutions into easy to understand instructions for developers
Passion for technology and interest in the ever changing technology landscape. 
Very strong attention to detail and time management.
Strong aspirations for personal and professional growth in the area of technology and programming in the world of HubSpot.
🛣️ Interview Process 
Intro Call (30 mins)
1st Interview (30 mins)
Take Home Assessment 
Presentation Interview (60 mins)
Final Interview (30 mins)
We aim to complete the process in under 10 working days (subject to availability).
🤝 Keen to Huble with us?
If you are ready to take on this exciting opportunity and join our team, we would love to hear from you. Apply today and let's Huble together!
NB - Please note that candidates must have the legal right to work and current residency in the region. 
Please note that we have not enlisted the help of external recruiters for this role. If contacted by someone outside of Huble who does not have the @hubledigital.com email domain, please inform us immediately. Thank you!

Key tasks involve architecting scalable solutions, leading development efforts across the stack, conducting code reviews, and providing technical guidance and mentorship to developers.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess 8+ years of full-stack development experience with proficiency in both frontend (React/Angular) and backend technologies (Node.js/Python/PHP), alongside 2+ years of team leadership experience. Essential requirements include proven architecture experience, strong team management skills, and in-depth knowledge of HubSpot's products and APIs.

You will play a pivotal role in designing, developing, and maintaining the architecture of solutions on the HubSpot platform, including websites, custom UI extensions, complex workflows, and API integrations. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams—developers, marketing consultants, designers, and project managers—to deliver scalable, innovative solutions. Your expertise will guide technical strategy, ensure best practices for HubSpot development, and bridge business requirements with technical execution. If you thrive in full-stack environments, enjoy working across both frontend and backend, and have a passion for leading and developing teams, we want to hear from you.
🚀 Here are a few of the tasks you'll get to work on
Software Architecture
Architect and design full-stack architectures for HubSpot solutions, ensuring scalability, modularity, and maintainability across both frontend and backend.
Collaborate with project managers, designers, marketing consultants, and developers to translate requirements into technical specifications and implementation plans.
Lead the development of both frontend components and backend integrations using modern technologies, frameworks, and best practices.
Provide technical guidance and mentorship to frontend and backend developers, fostering a culture of excellence and continuous improvement.
Conduct code reviews and provide feedback to ensure quality, adherence to standards, and performance optimization across the stack.
Stay updated with the latest technologies, HubSpot features, trends, and industry best practices, recommending new tools and techniques for adoption.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive innovation, enhance user experience, and deliver high-quality integrated solutions.
Identify and mitigate technical risks and challenges, proposing alternative solutions and contingency plans as needed.
Participate in architectural discussions, providing insights and recommendations to improve system design, performance, and maintainability.
Work closely with the pre-sales team to scope solutions and assess the feasibility of prospective client projects.
Maintain strong proficiency in HubSpot features and functionality, focusing on extending native capabilities through custom software, APIs, and integrations.
Team Management
Lead and manage a team of developers, providing technical guidance, mentorship, and career development support
Work together with your team members to provide feedback, support professional growth, and address concerns
Allocate and distribute work among team members based on skills, experience, and development goals
Create detailed technical briefs and implementation plans for the development team
Act as the primary technical interface between your development team and other stakeholders
Work with the Project Management and Resource Management teams to manage team capacity, workload, and deadlines to ensure efficient delivery of projects
Foster a positive team culture that promotes learning, innovation, and continuous improvement
Review the the outputs delivered by you and your team, ensure a high quality of delivery
🏗️ To excel in this role, you should have the following
Relevant qualification in computer science, software engineering, or related field.
8+ years of full-stack development experience with proficiency in both frontend technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks like React or Angular) and backend technologies (Node.js, Python, or PHP).
2+ years of team leadership or technical team lead experience
Experience in managing, mentoring, and developing technical team members
Strong team management and delegation skills
Experience in creating technical briefs and implementation plans for development teams
Proven track record of successfully leading technical projects and teams
Ability to balance hands-on technical work with team management responsibilities
Proven architecture experience in designing end-to-end systems, including both frontend components and backend services.
Understanding of architectural patterns such as component-based design, state management, and microservices.
Extensive experience with development tools, build systems, version control, and CI/CD pipelines.
Proficiency with RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and the ability to develop, consume, and validate APIs effectively.
Solid understanding of both frontend and backend performance optimization techniques and best practices.
Experience in developing responsive and mobile-first web applications with seamless backend integrations.
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to tackle complex technical challenges across the entire stack.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, working effectively with cross-functional teams, clients, and stakeholders.
Proven ability to gather, interpret, and implement functional and non-functional requirements for scalable, maintainable applications.
Keeping up-to-date with new technologies, frameworks, and best practices across both frontend and backend development.
In-depth knowledge of HubSpot’s products, APIs, and platform with a focus on custom extensions and integrations.
⚡️ These personal qualities are key to your success
Excellent communication skills and an ability to communicate with a broad range of stakeholders from clients, prospects, team members, the leadership team and senior management.
Strong leadership skills with the ability to motivate and inspire team members
Excellent mentoring and coaching abilities
Ability to provide constructive feedback and handle difficult conversations professionally
Strong emotional intelligence and empathy in managing team dynamics
Ability to prioritize and manage multiple competing demands while supporting team members
Excellent problem solving capability. None of our solutions are one-size-fits-all, every one of our customers have unique requirements which require creative problem solving.
Ability to translate your ideas and solutions into easy to understand instructions for developers
Passion for technology and interest in the ever changing technology landscape. 
Very strong attention to detail and time management.
Strong aspirations for personal and professional growth in the area of technology and programming in the world of HubSpot.
🛣️ Interview Process 
Intro Call (30 mins)
1st Interview (30 mins)
Take Home Assessment 
Presentation Interview (60 mins)
Final Interview (30 mins)
We aim to complete the process in under 10 working days (subject to availability).
🤝 Keen to Huble with us?
If you are ready to take on this exciting opportunity and join our team, we would love to hear from you. Apply today and let's Huble together!
NB - Please note that candidates must have the legal right to work and current residency in the region. 
Please note that we have not enlisted the help of external recruiters for this role. If contacted by someone outside of Huble who does not have the @hubledigital.com email domain, please inform us immediately. Thank you!

title: Solana Analyst
locations_derived: Capital City of Prague, Prague, Czechia
description_text:
The Role:
We’re already “big in Solana” and looking to scale the advantage - staying ahead of every development in the space and ensuring we miss no talented entrepreneur or high-growth investment opportunity in the Solana midst.
You will play a major part in this effort as our resident Solana guru. You will be constantly immersed in the SOL universe, developing an in-depth understanding of the ecosystem’s commercial trends and technical roadmap items, with an eye to identifying the best investment opportunities.
You will join a tight and collaborative investment team. You will continually hone your analytical skills on the job, and create detailed scenario analysis and investment memos. You will be expected to develop a network that you can leverage to reach and vet talented founders, and generate quality deal flow.
Key Responsibilities:Deal Sourcing
Proactively generate deal flow within the Solana ecosystem
Build and maintain strong relationships with Solana founders, investors, and ecosystem players that you leverage to access high-quality deals
Screen and evaluate incoming Solana investment opportunities
Map and monitor the Solana ecosystem for emerging opportunities
Deal Analysis
Conduct thorough research on key technical and commercial developments in the Solana ecosystem, and communicate findings in professional, insightful, engaging content that reinforces RockawayX’s thought leadership
Be a reliable information source, or our resident “Solana guru,” to colleagues seeking information on Solana developments and notable projects
Represent the firm at selected Solana ecosystem events and conferences
Build relationships with key stakeholders in the Solana ecosystem
Portfolio management
Working alongside our growth team, develop a view on the unique challenges Solana founders face, and how we can help to address them, ideally by leveraging our liquidity and engineering expertise
Support existing portfolio companies in the Solana ecosystem
Monitor portfolio performance and prepare regular updates; while venture is primarily a “bottom-up” investment exercise, provide insight on portfolio positioning / clusters of exposure
Identify and conduct analysis on follow-on investment opportunities
Ecosystem engagement and thought leadership
Conduct thorough research on key technical and commercial developments in the Solana ecosystem, and communicate findings in professional, insightful, engaging content that reinforces RockawayX’s thought leadership
Be a reliable information source, or our resident “Solana guru,” to colleagues seeking information on Solana developments and notable projects
Represent the firm at selected Solana ecosystem events and conferences
Build relationships with key stakeholders in the Solana ecosystem
Strong network and relationships within the Solana ecosystem
Bachelor's degree in business, economics, computer science, or related field
Min. 3 years of experience in crypto industry, with focus on or exposure to Solana
Track record of successful investments or deep involvement in Solana ecosystem
Understanding of Solana's technical architecture and ecosystem dynamics
Excellent communication and relationship-building skills
Self-starter mentality with strong entrepreneurial drive

After investment, we help by running the network of validators, auditing smart contracts, providing liquidity, engineering, hiring dev teams and building communities.

title: Freelance Automotive Engineer with Python Experience - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design graduate- and industry-level automotive engineering problems grounded in real practice; 
Evaluate AI-generated solutions for correctness, assumptions, and engineering logic; 
Validate analytical or numerical results using Python (NumPy, SciPy, Pandas); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with first principles and accepted engineering standards; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to assess multi-step problem solving. 
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for automotive engineers with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Automotive Engineering or related fields, e.g. Mechatronics, Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, etc. 
3+ years of professional automotive engineering experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., PE, CEng, PMP) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $40/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will design automotive engineering problems and evaluate AI-generated solutions for correctness. They will also validate results using Python and improve AI reasoning to align with engineering standards.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a degree in Automotive Engineering or related fields and at least 3 years of professional experience. Strong proficiency in Python and English is required, with additional certifications being advantageous.
linkedin_org_slogan: Be the “I” in AI with Mindrift. Work from anywhere on groundbreaking AI projects
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: CX Innovations Lead
locations_alt_raw: South Jakarta, South Jakarta City, Indonesia
description_text:
About the Amartha
At Amartha, we empower micro-businesses across Indonesia, enabling growth and equal prosperity. We’ve supported over 2.7 million entrepreneurs—mostly women—by disbursing IDR 22.8 trillion in funding. As we step into 2025, Amartha is evolving into a technology-driven financial ecosystem, expanding our reach in lending, funding, and payments. Through innovation and digital solutions, we aim to enhance accessibility, streamline processes, and create a seamless user experience.
About the Team
The Customer Experience (CX) Innovation team is responsible for driving continuous improvement across customer service operations through technology, data, and process innovation. The team works closely with Product, Engineering, Data, Operations, and external vendors to ensure scalable, efficient, and customer-centric service delivery. As CX Innovations Lead, you will play a critical role in shaping the future of CX by leveraging automation, AI, and system enhancements to support both customers and internal stakeholders.
Roles and ResponsibilitiesCX Innovation & Strategy
Lead CX innovation initiatives to improve customer experience, operational efficiency, and service scalability.
Identify opportunities to enhance CX processes through technology, automation, and AI adoption.
Translate business and CX pain points into system, data, and automation solutions.
Zendesk & CX System Development
Own and optimize Zendesk ecosystem, including ticketing, workflows, automations, triggers, macros, views, SLA, and reporting.
Lead system development initiatives related to CX platforms, integrations, and third-party tools.
Partner with Product and Engineering teams to design, test, and deploy CX-related system enhancements.
Ensure system stability, scalability, and readiness to support business growth.
AI & Automation Implementation
Drive implementation of AI solutions such as chatbots, auto-tagging, intent detection, sentiment analysis, and case routing.
Collaborate with internal teams and vendors to deploy AI use cases that reduce manual workload and improve resolution time.
Continuously evaluate AI performance and iterate based on CX outcomes and data insights.
Data & Insights for CX and Stakeholders
Build and improve CX data foundations, including data structure, taxonomy, and reporting frameworks.
Develop dashboards and insights for CX leadership and cross-functional stakeholders.
Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and relevance for operational, tactical, and strategic decision-making.
Use data insights to recommend service, process, and system improvements.
Service & Process Improvement
Lead service improvement initiatives across customer journeys and CX channels.
Standardize and document CX processes, SOPs, and best practices aligned with system capabilities.
Support continuous improvement initiatives to enhance SLA performance, customer satisfaction, and agent productivity.
Partner with Operations and Quality teams to measure impact and sustain improvements.
Stakeholder & Change Management
Act as a key liaison between CX, Product, Engineering, Data, Compliance, and Business teams.
Manage change adoption for new systems, AI tools, and process improvements.
Prepare business cases, impact analysis, and post-implementation reviews for CX initiatives.
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Information Systems, Engineering, Data, or a related field.
5+ years of experience in Customer Experience, CX Operations, CX Systems, or Digital Transformation roles.
Strong hands-on experience with Zendesk (administration, automation, reporting, and integrations).
Proven experience implementing AI or automation solutions within customer service environments.
Strong analytical skills with experience in CX data, dashboards, and performance metrics.
Experience working with cross-functional teams (Product, Engineering, Data, Operations).
Solid understanding of system development lifecycle, requirements gathering, and UAT.
Strong communication, stakeholder management, and problem-solving skills.
Experience in fintech, digital services, or regulated industries is a plus.
At Amartha, we are dedicated to creating a workplace that celebrates diversity, ensures equity, and fosters inclusion. We believe that diverse perspectives—shaped by factors such as gender, age, race, ethnicity, education, culture, and life experiences—drive innovation and growth.
We actively welcome individuals from all backgrounds to join us in building an environment where everyone feels respected, valued, and empowered. Our commitment is to provide equal opportunities and foster a sense of belonging that enables our employees to thrive and make meaningful contributions.
ai_core_responsibilities: The CX Innovations Lead will drive initiatives to enhance customer experience and operational efficiency through technology and automation. This role involves optimizing the Zendesk ecosystem and implementing AI solutions to improve service delivery.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a bachelor's degree and at least 5 years of experience in customer experience or related fields. Strong hands-on experience with Zendesk and proven experience in implementing AI solutions are essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: We do meaningful works everyday that drives shared prosperity, bettering lives on one village at a time.
linkedin_org_locations: Jl. TB Simatupang No.18, RT.2/RW.1, Cilandak Barat, Kec. Cilandak, Jakarta Selatan, Jakarta 12430, ID
linkedin_org_description:
We are a technology company to harmoniously build a strong economy from the grassroots in order to realize the grassroots communities of technology equity, inclusiveness and sustainability.

We believe prosperity platform is the right solution to deliver high quality digital financial services and to bridge the gap that brings shared prosperity to the World.

Amartha’s Team are highly compassionate people who are impatient to deliver their impacts to alleviate the sufferings of others.

Working at Amartha means you are part of dynamic and compassionate team who make impact on daily basis. It means you sign up for a high-paced environment where everyone is taking part in achieving success and make other people happier.

It also means you wake up every single day energized, and excited of what’s next to be done to help Indonesia and the world a more equitable and prosperous place to live for everyone.

It means you feel special, as whatever you do with Amartha makes a dent in the universe, healing the world a day at a time.

Working at Amartha means you are ready to help and alleviate each other, contribute your best with empathy and passion. As we go long miles, you need a team to achieve your success.

Working at Amartha means you have made a conscious choice to embark on a journey to creating a less painful world. A journey that makes you feel good, that you have contributed to a meaningful work every single day.

Join our impact mission! Check our career page now👉🏼 https://careers.amartha.com/

title: Supervisor #Cosmos Sport Σύρος - New Store
description_text:
Cosmos Sport SA, member of JD Sports Fashion Plc, founded in September of 1982. First store opened in Heraklion-Crete and since then the network expanded 100 further physical stores in Greece & Cyprus, 5 retail brands (JD Sports, Cosmos Sport, Sneaker10, Slamdunk, Rundome) 8 on-line shops and thousands of happy customers in Greece and Cyprus. Cosmos Sport is a constantly growing omnichannel company with a strong passion for sportswear, street style and limited items. Our team consists of 1800+ highly skilled, self-motivated young people, who love sports and have a passion for innovation! We are proud that Cosmossport.gr is now the No1 on-line store in the industry also selling abroad, having been awarded for 7 consecutive years as the best online sports shop in the country in e-volution Awards. We are excited being a preferred partner for global brands like Nike, Adidas, Reebok in the SEE.

We are looking for a talented and passionate Supervisor for our Cosmos Sport Store in Syros!
Being part of the store’s Junior Management team you will provide managerial support and help maintain and improve the levels of customer service throughout your section. You will provide assistance in the supervision of all staff while maintaining the standards of the shop floor. Furthermore, you will deal with certain managerial processes on a daily basis as instructed by Store Management.
Responsibilities:
Customer Service
Provide customers with excellent levels of Customer service.
Deal with customer complaints and enquires, providing the best possible outcome.
Ensure the personal appearance of sales staff is in line with company guidelines.
Have an understanding of the Customer Service measuring programme.
Sales
Ensure that targets are achieved and, where possible, exceeded.
Monitor staff service levels in order to maximise store sales.
Utilise in-store devices, making sure that the customer is offered the whole product range.
Use reports to assist you in product placement of key selling lines.
Visual Merchandising
Attract, engage and motivate customers into making purchases in store by using the latest visual techniques.
Provide assistance with the maintenance of standards on the sales floor.
Keep stock clean and presentable at all times.
Training & Development
Encourage personal progression throughout your store
Provide assistance with the induction and training of new starters.
Assist with the development of existing staff, ensuring that personnel completes the relevant E-Assessments.
Experience in equivalent position in Retail area (ideally in fashion, Retail Supervisor experience would be advantageous).
Excellent Time Management skills
Strong verbal and written communication skills and interpersonal skills
Excellent use of English language and computer skills
Numerical and analytical knowledge to monitor KPIs
Passion for sports and fashion
Willingness to learn and tackle new challenges
Competitive compensation package & performance bonus
Career development opportunities & education programs
Free Diagnostic Tests for all our employees at the Euromedica Group's diagnostic centres
Health & wellness programs to keep you active
One day off, part of our "parents’ day off" program
Generous employee discount in all our brands
Up to 75% discount at the European University of Cyprus (face-to-face or online attendance)
Extras, discounts and perks-We offer a variety of 100+ cool extras! Link here
ai_benefits: Discount at the European University of Cyprus
ai_core_responsibilities: The Supervisor will provide managerial support and help maintain customer service levels while supervising staff. Responsibilities include dealing with customer complaints, achieving sales targets, and assisting in training new employees.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have experience in a retail supervisory role, ideally in fashion, along with excellent time management and communication skills. A passion for sports and fashion is also essential.
linkedin_org_description:
Η ιστορία της Cosmos Sport ξεκινάει περίπου 40 χρόνια πριν, στη Χερσόνησο του Ηρακλείου Κρήτης, όταν το πρώτο ομώνυμο κατάστημα άνοιξε το 1982, εστιάζοντας στην ικανοποίηση του πελάτη, στο προϊόν και στην αθλητική κουλτούρα. Μέσα στα επόμενα χρόνια, κατέγραψε μια σταθερή αναπτυξιακή πορεία, επεκτείνοντας τις δραστηριότητές της σε μεγάλα αστικά κέντρα, αλλά και στην Κύπρο. Από το 2021, είναι μέλος του βρετανικού κολοσσού JD Sports Fashion Plc., και πλέον αριθμεί 6 εμπορικές επωνυμίες (www.cosmossport.gr, www.jdsports.gr www.sneaker10.gr, www.sportsfactory.gr, www.slamdunk.gr, www.rundome.gr) 90+ φυσικά καταστήματα, 9 πρωτοπόρα ηλεκτρονικά καταστήματα, και πάνω από 1.500 εργαζομένους σε Ελλάδα και Κύπρο! 

Όραμά μας είναι να μας αναγνωρίζουν ως την καλύτερη εμπειρία Sports & Athleisure αγορών, σε κάθε σημείο επαφής μας με τον πελάτη. Καθημερινά μας κινητοποιούν ο ενθουσιασμός των πελατών μας, η καινοτόμος δράση και το πάθος να κάνουμε τη διαφορά ως ομάδα.

Στη Cosmos ξεκινάμε την κάθε μας μέρα με μία νέα πρόκληση, επιδιώκοντας να γινόμαστε όλο και καλύτεροι - για εμάς, για τους ανθρώπους και τους πελάτες μας, για την κοινωνία και το περιβάλλον, για τον κόσμο μας. Με σεβασμό στη διαφορετικότητα & τη συμπερίληψη, τα προϊόντα, οι υπηρεσίες και οι δράσεις μας έχουν κοινό στόχο την αλλαγή και την εξέλιξη προς ένα μέλλον βιώσιμο, ανοιχτό για όλες και όλους, γεμάτο ευκαιρίες.

Σκοπός μας είναι να δίνουμε τον τόνο που θα ενθαρρύνει έναν πιο δραστήριο τρόπο ζωής και να ενδυναμώσουμε όσα άτομα τολμούν να υπερβούν τα όριά τους και διεκδικούν να εκφραστούν με το δικό τους μοναδικό τρόπο, προσφέροντας μεγάλη ποικιλία ρούχων, παπουτσιών, αξεσουάρ και εξοπλισμού από Κορυφαία Sport & Athleisure brands σε όλο τον κόσμο.

Μαζί, κάνουμε καθημερινά τον Κόσμο μας καλύτερο.

title: Spa Trainee | Eréma, a Member of Design Hotels, Milos (Season 2026)
description_text:
Spa Therapist
About us
Empiria Group owns, manages, and operates a distinctive collection of luxury hotels and villas, members of The Luxury Collection and Design Hotels™ by Marriott International, located in some of Greece’s most iconic destinations: Santorini, Paros, Milos, and the Peloponnese.
With more than 30 years of expertise and a team of over 400 associates, Empiria Group is driven by a shared purpose: to create space for joy through elevated hospitality experiences. Our culture is shaped by four core values — finding joy, always elevating, exuding passion, and leading with purpose — guiding everything we do.
At Empiria Group, hospitality is more than a profession. It is a craft, a mindset, and a journey of continuous growth.
Role Overview
The Spa Trainee supports the Spa Team in delivering exceptional wellness experiences, while learning a variety of spa treatments and assisting with the daily operations of the spa. This role offers hands-on training and development within a luxury hospitality environment.
Key Accountabilities
Assisting senior Spa Therapists in performing spa treatments, learning and practicing techniques under supervision
Preparing treatment rooms, equipment, and supplies to ensure readiness for therapists and guests
Observing guest consultations and learning how to assess guest needs and recommend suitable treatments
Supporting the setup and breakdown of spa areas, maintaining cleanliness and organization at all times
Developing knowledge of spa services, products, and treatments, and assisting in their promotion to guests
Welcoming guests warmly and assisting with basic inquiries regarding spa services and schedules
Supporting the spa team with administrative tasks, including treatment records and inventory management
Adhering to health, safety, and hygiene standards to ensure a safe and welcoming environment
Participating in ongoing training and professional development to build skills and knowledge in spa treatments
Assisting guests with post-treatment care and recommendations, ensuring a memorable spa experience
Strong interest in pursuing a career in the spa and wellness industry
Excellent knowledge of the English language; additional languages will be considered an asset
Ability to work effectively as part of a team
Candidate’s Profile
Positive attitude with a strong willingness to learn
Passion for delivering exceptional levels of guest service
Pleasant personality with a client-oriented mindset
At Empiria Group, our hotels are more than workplaces — they are environments where people grow, evolve, and find purpose.
Staff accommodation with Wi-Fi and air conditioning.
Half-board meal plan (Breakfast & Lunch).
Continuous training and development opportunities.
Career growth opportunities within Empiria Group and across Marriott International properties worldwide.
At Empiria Group we are proud to foster Equal Employment Opportunities regardless of race, color, ethnicity, religion, gender, age, disability, or sexual orientation. All applications are considered strictly confidential. After careful consideration of all the resumes received, we will only contact the candidates who meet the requirements of the job to arrange an interview. ​
You provide the Talent!
We provide the Space for Opportunity and Growth!

ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a strong interest in the spa and wellness industry and excellent knowledge of the English language. A positive attitude, willingness to learn, and a client-oriented mindset are essential.

Empiria Group  is a privately owned Greek company created in 1989 by Antonis Eliopoulos. Today, Antonis Eliopoulos with his wife Kalia Konstantinidou own and manage successfully 3 well known and awarded 5* hotels and 6 Luxurious Villas in Santorini and two 5* hotels in Paros. Empiria Group elevates authentic, Greek hospitality through its distinct brands of organic, understated luxury. With a strong sense of location in the most exclusive destinations, each unique property offers a celebration of Greek escape for the experiential traveler by the most caring and positive associates.

title: SHEQ Advisor
description_text:
As a leading provider of industrial water treatment solutions Envirogen Group is committed to maintaining the highest standards in safety, health, environment, and quality (SHEQ) across our operations. We are currently seeking a passionate and knowledgeable SHEQ Advisor to join our team and ensure that these standards are not only met but exceeded.
In this role, you will be supporting the SHEQ manager in promoting a culture of SHEQ excellence throughout the organization, providing guidance and support to employees at all levels. Your expertise will help develop, implement, and maintain SHEQ management systems and practices, ensuring compliance with all legal and regulatory requirements.
The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of SHEQ principles and practices, along with excellent communication and coaching skills. You will engage with staff to foster a proactive approach to risk management and continuous improvement, ultimately contributing to a safer and more efficient workplace.
If you are looking to make a meaningful impact in an innovative organization dedicated to sustainability and quality, consider joining us at Envirogen.
Significant experience in SHEQ roles in a manufacturing, construction, engineering environment -preferably in the water or wastewater industry.
Strong knowledge of relevant legislation and industry standards (e.g., ISO 45001, ISO 14001, ISO 9001).
Exceptional communication skills, both verbal and written.
Proficiency in risk assessment and management practices.
Experience in training and educating staff on SHEQ matters.
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
Relevant SHEQ certifications (e.g., NEBOSH, IOSH) are preferred.
Car Allowance
Private Healthcare
ai_core_responsibilities: The advisor will support the SHEQ manager in promoting a culture of SHEQ excellence and ensuring compliance with all legal and regulatory requirements across operations. This includes developing, implementing, and maintaining SHEQ management systems and practices.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess significant experience in SHEQ roles, preferably within manufacturing, construction, or engineering environments, particularly in the water or wastewater industry. Strong knowledge of relevant legislation and standards like ISO certifications, coupled with excellent communication and risk management skills, is essential.

title: Work Experience Programme at Vitesse
description_text:
Applications now open! 
Location: London, 5 days.
Programme Dates: 13th–17th April 2026 
Places Available: 4 students only 
Eligibility: Students in Years 9–12 
Application Window: 6th–20th February 2026 
About the Programme 
Our Work Experience Programme gives students an exciting opportunity to explore the world of work inside a fast‑growing fintech scale‑up. Over the course of one week, you’ll gain hands‑on exposure across different teams, learn essential workplace skills, and discover career pathways you may want to pursue in the future. This programme supports Vitesse’s commitment to social mobility, early career development, and creating opportunities for students who may not otherwise have access to the industry. 
What you’ll Experience: 
Across the week, you’ll spend time with teams such as: 
People & Talent 
Technology & Engineering 
Commercial / Business Development 
Customer Support 
Finance & Operations 
Who Can Apply? (Screening Criteria) 
To ensure fairness and safeguarding, applicants must meet the following: 
Right to participate 
Students must have the legal right to be in the UK for the duration of the programme. 
If under 18, a parent/guardian must provide consent. 
An NDA must be signed. 
A school recommendation must be obtained 
Your school contact details must be provided 
Availability
Hour will be 9am-5pm, with a 1 hour lunch break between 12pm-1pm. 
Safeguarding & Compliance
All participants will undergo background checks. 
Students will be issued a laptop for structured tasks. 
How to Apply 
Applications will be managed through the Vitesse Careers Page and processed via Workable, just like our job roles, you can email your CV to workexperience@vitesse.io 
How We Select Students – Skills, Strengths & Potential
Because this is an entry‑level opportunity, we focus on motivation and potential, not experience. 
You will be assessed on: 
Curiosity and willingness to learn 
Commitment to participating fully 
Personal strengths (e.g., communication, teamwork, creativity) 
Interest in business, technology, people, or related fields 
You will need to submit
A personal statement (300–400 words) explaining: 
Why you want to join 
How the programme fits your interests 
Any career paths you’re considering 
We will obtain
A letter of recommendation from a teacher or school representative. 
Written screening (personal statement + recommendation) 
Process
Short 30-minute Microsoft teams' video interview with Safa Iqbal (Employee experience specialist) and then a 30-minute video interview final with Clara Moretti-Parker (Head of Talent) 
This approach helps us select students who truly want to be here and will get the most value from the experience. 
Our work experience programme has been designed to give you a broad introduction to the world of work - but the benefits go far beyond simple exposure.
• Experience a fast‑growing fintech environment
You’ll spend time across multiple teams, giving you insight into how a modern technology‑driven business operates day‑to‑day. This helps you understand different career paths and what roles might suit you in the future.
• Build real employability skills
Throughout the week, you’ll develop skills such as communication, teamwork, problem‑solving, professionalism, and confidence - the same core skills employers look for when hiring.
• Learn from experts in their field
You’ll be surrounded by talented people across Technology, People & Talent, Customer Support, Commercial, Finance and more. You’ll learn through observation, mentoring, and hands‑on tasks where appropriate.
• Take part in real workplace experiences
From shadowing meetings to completing a short end‑of‑week presentation, you’ll get a genuine feel for workplace expectations, tools, and ways of working.
• Gain structured, inclusive access to industry experience
Our programme is intentionally designed to open doors for students who may not otherwise have access to professional networks. We focus on fairness, equal opportunity, and supporting social mobility.
• Build confidence for your future
By the end of the programme, you’ll have a clearer sense of your strengths, your interests, and how you might want to shape your future career. You’ll also walk away with practical insights to support applications for future roles, apprenticeships, or further study.
• Supportive environment with safeguarding built‑in
Small cohorts ensure you receive personalised attention, support, and a high‑quality learning experience in a safe, structured setting.
Our commitment to Inclusion: 
We welcome applications from students from all backgrounds and are committed to making the programme inclusive and accessible. If you require reasonable adjustments at any stage, please let us know - we are happy to support you. 
We’re excited to welcome the next generation of talent to Vitesse! If you’re curious, motivated and eager to learn - we’d love to hear from you!
ai_core_responsibilities: Participants will gain hands-on exposure across different teams and learn essential workplace skills. They will also discover potential career pathways during the programme.
ai_requirements_summary: Applicants must have the legal right to be in the UK and obtain a school recommendation. They should also be motivated and show potential rather than prior experience.

linkedin_org_description:
Vitesse is the trusted financial infrastructure connecting the global insurance ecosystem. Purpose-built for insurers, brokers, MGAs, and TPAs, Vitesse offers a unified platform that optimizes claims funds, enables real-time global payments, and delivers end-to-end financial control.

To date, Vitesse has facilitated more than $20 billion in payments across 200+ countries and currencies, returning hundreds of millions in claims funds to insurers’ balance sheets. Licensed by the FCA in the UK and DNB in Europe, Vitesse also operates Vitesse Trust Company, LLC, which is regulated by the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS).

Headquartered in London, with a growing presence across Europe and the US, Vitesse employs over 175 people worldwide. In 2024, the company secured $93 million in Series C funding led by KKR to accelerate its US expansion and drive continued product innovation.

With its scalable, trusted platform, Vitesse is redefining how money moves in insurance—helping the industry act faster, stay in control, and excel.

title: Spa Trainee | Vedema, a Luxury Collection Resort (Season 2026)
description_text:
Spa Therapist
About us
Empiria Group owns, manages, and operates a distinctive collection of luxury hotels and villas, members of The Luxury Collection and Design Hotels™ by Marriott International, located in some of Greece’s most iconic destinations: Santorini, Paros, Milos, and the Peloponnese.
With more than 30 years of expertise and a team of over 400 associates, Empiria Group is driven by a shared purpose: to create space for joy through elevated hospitality experiences. Our culture is shaped by four core values — finding joy, always elevating, exuding passion, and leading with purpose — guiding everything we do.
At Empiria Group, hospitality is more than a profession. It is a craft, a mindset, and a journey of continuous growth.
Role Overview
The Spa Trainee supports the Spa Team in delivering exceptional wellness experiences, while learning a variety of spa treatments and assisting with the daily operations of the spa. This role offers hands-on training and development within a luxury hospitality environment.
Key Accountabilities
Assisting senior Spa Therapists in performing spa treatments, learning and practicing techniques under supervision
Preparing treatment rooms, equipment, and supplies to ensure readiness for therapists and guests
Observing guest consultations and learning how to assess guest needs and recommend suitable treatments
Supporting the setup and breakdown of spa areas, maintaining cleanliness and organization at all times
Developing knowledge of spa services, products, and treatments, and assisting in their promotion to guests
Welcoming guests warmly and assisting with basic inquiries regarding spa services and schedules
Supporting the spa team with administrative tasks, including treatment records and inventory management
Adhering to health, safety, and hygiene standards to ensure a safe and welcoming environment
Participating in ongoing training and professional development to build skills and knowledge in spa treatments
Assisting guests with post-treatment care and recommendations, ensuring a memorable spa experience
Strong interest in pursuing a career in the spa and wellness industry
Excellent knowledge of the English language; additional languages will be considered an asset
Ability to work effectively as part of a team
Candidate’s Profile
Positive attitude with a strong willingness to learn
Passion for delivering exceptional levels of guest service
Pleasant personality with a client-oriented mindset
At Empiria Group, our hotels are more than workplaces — they are environments where people grow, evolve, and find purpose.
Staff accommodation with Wi-Fi and air conditioning.
Half-board meal plan (Breakfast & Lunch).
Continuous training and development opportunities.
Career growth opportunities within Empiria Group and across Marriott International properties worldwide.
At Empiria Group we are proud to foster Equal Employment Opportunities regardless of race, color, ethnicity, religion, gender, age, disability, or sexual orientation. All applications are considered strictly confidential. After careful consideration of all the resumes received, we will only contact the candidates who meet the requirements of the job to arrange an interview. ​
You provide the Talent!
We provide the Space for Opportunity and Growth!

ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a strong interest in the spa and wellness industry and possess excellent English language skills. A positive attitude and a willingness to learn are essential.
